10111000987_1_1你想清理城市周围的野狼【修改】？不错的主意。Oh, you wanna clear the crazy White Mutants around our city? I like this idea.Oh, vous voulez éliminer ces singes sauvages autour de notre ville? J'aime cette idée.Oh, du willst die verrückten Weißen Mutanten rund um unsere Stadt loswerden? Die Idee gefällt mir.Oh, you wanna clear the Crazy Degenerates around our city? I like this idea.你想清理城市周圍的野蠻猴？不錯的主意。Oh, you wanna clear the crazy White Mutants around our city? I like this idea.โอ้ คุณต้องการกำจัดพวกมิวแตนต์ขนขาวจอมคลั่งที่อยู่รอบเมืองของเรางั้นรึ ฉันชอบความคิดนี้นะOh, ¿quieres acabar con los mutantes blancos que hay en nuestra ciudad? Me gusta la idea.О, ты хочешь избавиться от Сумасшедших Дегенератов вокруг нашего города? Мне нравится эта идея.Oh, you wanna clear the Crazy Degenerates around our city? I like this idea.Oh, you wanna clear the crazy White Mutants around our city? I like this idea.Oh, you wanna clear the crazy White Mutants around our city? I like this idea.Oh, you wanna clear the crazy White Mutants around our city? I like this idea.Oh, you wanna clear the crazy White Mutants around our city? I like this idea.Oh, you wanna clear the crazy White Mutants around our city? I like this idea.Oh, you wanna clear the crazy White Mutants around our city? I like this idea.你想清理城市周围的野狼【修改】？不错的主意。
100
10111000997_1_2他们总是在城市周边游荡，打砸抢烧，侵扰无辜的城民和过路人。They’re always wandering around our city, plundering and destroying everything they have seen. Our innocent citizens and passersby are deeply unnerved.Ils errent toujours autour de nos villes, pillant et détruisant tout ce qu'ils trouvent. Les citoyens ne se sentent pas en sécurité.Sie treiben sich immer bei unserer Stadt herum und plündern oder zerstören, was immer sie in die Finger kriegen. Unsere unschuldigen Bürger und Passanten sind ziemlich verärgert über sie.Eles estão sempre vagando pela nossa cidade, saqueando e destruindo tudo que veem pela frente. Nossos inocentes cidadãos e passantes estão profundamente incomodados.他們總是在城市周邊遊蕩，打砸搶燒，侵擾無辜的城民和過路人。They’re always wandering around our city, plundering and destroying everything they have seen. Our innocent citizens and passersby are deeply unnerved.พวกนั้นจะเดินไปรอบ ๆ เมืองของเรา จากนั้นก็เข้าปล้นและทำลายทุกสิ่งที่พวกนั้นเจออยู่เป็นประจำ พลเมืองผู้บริสุทธิ์ของเราและลิงที่เดินผ่านไปมาต้องเสียขวัญกันกระเจิงSiempre deambulan por la ciudad, saquean y destruyen todo a su alrededor. Nuestros ciudadanos y transeúntes inocentes están muy desconcertados.Они постоянно скитаются по нашему городу, грабят и уничтожают всё, что попадается им на глаза. Наши невинные горожане и прохожие глубоко расстроены.They’re always wandering around our city, plundering and destroying everything they have seen. Our innocent citizens and passersby are deeply unnerved.They’re always wandering around our city, plundering and destroying everything they have seen. Our innocent citizens and passersby are deeply unnerved.They’re always wandering around our city, plundering and destroying everything they have seen. Our innocent citizens and passersby are deeply unnerved.They’re always wandering around our city, plundering and destroying everything they have seen. Our innocent citizens and passersby are deeply unnerved.They’re always wandering around our city, plundering and destroying everything they have seen. Our innocent citizens and passersby are deeply unnerved.They’re always wandering around our city, plundering and destroying everything they have seen. Our innocent citizens and passersby are deeply unnerved.They’re always wandering around our city, plundering and destroying everything they have seen. Our innocent citizens and passersby are deeply unnerved.他们总是在城市周边游荡，打砸抢烧，侵扰无辜的城民和过路人。
101
10111001007_1_3野狼【修改】是被残留的核辐射污染而变异的猴子，虽然作为曾经的同类，我为他们感到很惋惜……The White Mutants are the result of nuclear radiation. Although I feel a little sorry for them because they were the same as us…Les sauvages sont des mutants, ils sont devenus ainsi suite a une trop grande exposition aux radiations. Ils n'étaient pas différents de nous auparavant.Die Weißen Mutanten sind das Ergebnis radioaktiver Strahlung. Trotzdem tun sie mir ein wenig leid, sie waren einst wie wir …Os Degenerados Malucos são o resultado de mutações devido à chuva nuclear restante. Eles já foram iguais a nós, mas agora só sinto dó deles.野蠻猴是被殘留的核輻射汙染而變異的猴子，雖然作為曾經的同類，我為他們感到很惋惜……The White Mutants are the result of nuclear radiation. Although I feel a little sorry for them because they were the same as us…พวกมิวแตนต์ขนขาวนี่เกิดมาจากรังสีนิวเคลียร์ แม้ว่าฉันจะรู้สึกเสียใจอยู่บ้างเรื่องพวกเขาก็เถอะ เพราะยังไงพวกเขาก็เป็นลิงเหมือนเรา...Los mutantes blancos son el resultado de la radiación nuclear. Siento un poco de lástima por ellos, porque alguna vez fuimos todos iguales.Сумасшедшие Дегенераты - результат мутаций из-за воздействия оставшихся ядерных осадков. Когда-то они были такими же, как мы, но теперь мне их жалко.The Crazy Degenerates are the result of mutations due to the remaining nuclear fallout. They were once the same as us, but now I only feel sorry for them.The White Mutants are the result of nuclear radiation. Although I feel a little sorry for them because they were the same as us…The White Mutants are the result of nuclear radiation. Although I feel a little sorry for them because they were the same as us…The White Mutants are the result of nuclear radiation. Although I feel a little sorry for them because they were the same as us…The White Mutants are the result of nuclear radiation. Although I feel a little sorry for them because they were the same as us…The White Mutants are the result of nuclear radiation. Although I feel a little sorry for them because they were the same as us…The White Mutants are the result of nuclear radiation. Although I feel a little sorry for them because they were the same as us…野狼【修改】是被残留的核辐射污染而变异的猴子，虽然作为曾经的同类，我为他们感到很惋惜……
102
10111001017_1_4但是，他们现在只是失去理智的凶残猛兽，清除他们，让他们解脱是我们唯一能为他们做的。Now they’re just fierce beasts without any sanity. Wiping them out is the only mercy we can give them. Let’s end their pains.Dorénavant ce ne sont plus que des bêtes féroces et violentes. Les anéantir est la seule miséricorde que nous puissions leur accorder. Mettons fin à leurs douleurs.Aber jetzt sind sie nur wilde Bestien ohne Sinn und Verstand. Sie auszulöschen ist die einzige Gnade, die wir ihnen geben können. Lass uns ihren Schmerz beenden.Agora eles são apenas feras que ficaram loucas. Exterminá-los é a única misericórdia que podemos ter. Vamos acabar com a dor deles.但是，他們現在只是失去理智的凶殘猛獸，清除他們，讓他們解脫是我們唯一能為他們做的。Now they’re just fierce beasts without any sanity. Wiping them out is the only mercy we can give them. Let’s end their pains.แต่ตอนนี้พวกเขากลายเป็นแค่สัตว์อสูรที่ไร้จิตใจ การกำจัดพวกนั้นออกไปคือความเมตตาเดียวที่เรามอบให้ได้ มาจบความเจ็บปวดนี้กันเถอะAhora no son más que bestias feroces sin cordura. Eliminarlos es la única clemencia que podemos darles. Acabemos con su dolor.Теперь они просто жестокие звери, которые сошли с ума. Истребление - единственная милость, которую мы можем им предложить. Давайте прекратим их боль.Now they’re just fierce beasts that have gone insane. Wiping them out is the only mercy we can give them. Let’s end their pain.Now they’re just fierce beasts without any sanity. Wiping them out is the only mercy we can give them. Let’s end their pains.Now they’re just fierce beasts without any sanity. Wiping them out is the only mercy we can give them. Let’s end their pains.Now they’re just fierce beasts without any sanity. Wiping them out is the only mercy we can give them. Let’s end their pains.Now they’re just fierce beasts without any sanity. Wiping them out is the only mercy we can give them. Let’s end their pains.Now they’re just fierce beasts without any sanity. Wiping them out is the only mercy we can give them. Let’s end their pains.Now they’re just fierce beasts without any sanity. Wiping them out is the only mercy we can give them. Let’s end their pains.但是，他们现在只是失去理智的凶残猛兽，清除他们，让他们解脱是我们唯一能为他们做的。
103
10111001027_1_5——也是你能为城里的猴民们做的。Of course, it’ll also what you can do to help all primates in the city.Bien sûr, c'est aussi ce que vous pouvez faire pour aider tous les primates de la ville.Natürlich hilfst du damit auch gleich allen Primaten in der Stadt!Claro, isso também ajudará todos os primatas da cidade.——也是你能為城裡的猴民們做的。Of course, it’ll also what you can do to help all primates in the city.แน่นอน และนี่คือสิ่งที่คุณสามารถทำได้ เพื่อช่วยเหล่าลิงทุกตัวในเมืองด้วยPor supuesto, esto también beneficiará a todos los primates de la ciudad.Это, конечно, также поможет всем приматам в городе.Of course, it’ll also help all the primates in the city.Of course, it’ll also what you can do to help all primates in the city.Of course, it’ll also what you can do to help all primates in the city.Of course, it’ll also what you can do to help all primates in the city.Of course, it’ll also what you can do to help all primates in the city.Of course, it’ll also what you can do to help all primates in the city.Of course, it’ll also what you can do to help all primates in the city.——也是你能为城里的猴民们做的。
104
10111001037_2_1哦，一次惊险的战斗！这些家伙真是狂暴。Oh, the fight was too close! The White Mutants were just on a rampage!Oh, le combat était serré! Les sauvages étaient déchainés, comme à leur habitude.Puh, das war ganz schön knapp! Die Weißen Mutanten sind völlig ausgerastet!Oh, essa luta estava muito perto! Os Degenerados Malucos estavam em fúria!哦，一次驚險的戰鬥！這些傢伙真是狂暴。Oh, the fight was too close! The White Mutants were just on a rampage!โอ้ การต่อสู้อยู่ใกล้กว่าที่คิด! มิวแตนต์ขนขาวออกอาละวาดแล้ว!¡Uf, ha sido una pelea dura! ¡Los mutantes blancos estaban furiosos!О, эта битва была слишком близко! Сумасшедшие Дегенераты были в ярости!Oh, that fight was too damn close! The Crazy Degenerates were on a rampage!Oh, the fight was too close! The White Mutants were just on a rampage!Oh, the fight was too close! The White Mutants were just on a rampage!Oh, the fight was too close! The White Mutants were just on a rampage!Oh, the fight was too close! The White Mutants were just on a rampage!Oh, the fight was too close! The White Mutants were just on a rampage!Oh, the fight was too close! The White Mutants were just on a rampage!哦，一次惊险的战斗！这些家伙真是狂暴。
105
10111001047_2_2在这次战斗中，你的部队出现了伤兵，你需要在医院中治疗他们There are some injured soldiers from the fight. You should heal them in the Hospital.Des soldats ont été blessés lors du combat. Vous devez les soigner à l'hôpital.In dem Kampf haben sich einige Soldaten verletzt. Du solltest sie im Krankenhaus heilen.Após a luta, temos algumas unidades feridas. Você deve curá-los no hospital.在這次戰鬥中，你的部隊出現了傷兵，你需要在醫院中治療他們There are some injured soldiers from the fight. You should heal them in the Hospital.มีทหารบาดเจ็บจากการต่อสู้ด้วย คุณควรรักษาพวกเขาในโรงพยาบาลก่อนDespués del combate, tenemos algunos soldados heridos. Deberías atenderlos en el hospital.После битвы у нас остались раненые войска. Вам нужно вылечить их в Госпитале.After the fight, we have some injured units. You should heal them in the Hospital.There are some injured soldiers from the fight. You should heal them in the Hospital.There are some injured soldiers from the fight. You should heal them in the Hospital.There are some injured soldiers from the fight. You should heal them in the Hospital.There are some injured soldiers from the fight. You should heal them in the Hospital.There are some injured soldiers from the fight. You should heal them in the Hospital.There are some injured soldiers from the fight. You should heal them in the Hospital.在这次战斗中，你的部队出现了伤兵，你需要在医院中治疗他们
106
10111001058_1_1就是这样，伙计，这些士兵就是你的力量，对他们好一点！That’s it buddy! Your soldiers bring you Power! So treat them nicely!C'est ça! Vos soldats vous apportent le pouvoir! Alors, traitez-les bien!Ganz richtig, Kumpel! Deine Soldaten verleihen dir Stärke, also behandle sie gut!É isso aí, amigo! Unidades que você tem te dão Poder! Então, trate-os bem!就是這樣，夥計，這些士兵就是你的力量，對他們好一點！That’s it buddy! Your soldiers bring you Power! So treat them nicely!อย่างนั้นแหละเพื่อน! ทหารของคุณจะนำพลังมาให้คุณ! ดังนั้น ต้องปฏิบัติต่อพวกเขาให้ดี!¡Eso es, amigo! ¡Tus soldados te dan poder! ¡Trátalos bien!Вот и всё, дружище! Ваши войска и есть ваша Сила! Так что относитесь к ним правильно!That’s it, buddy! Units you have get you Power! So, treat them nicely!That’s it buddy! Your soldiers bring you Power! So treat them nicely!That’s it buddy! Your soldiers bring you Power! So treat them nicely!That’s it buddy! Your soldiers bring you Power! So treat them nicely!That’s it buddy! Your soldiers bring you Power! So treat them nicely!That’s it buddy! Your soldiers bring you Power! So treat them nicely!That’s it buddy! Your soldiers bring you Power! So treat them nicely!就是这样，伙计，这些士兵就是你的力量，对他们好一点！
107
10111001068_1_2请一定记住，超出医院容量的伤兵将会死亡。And please bear in mind, the wounded soldiers not in the hospital’s capacity will die.Et n'oubliez pas que les soldats blessés qui ne sont pas en mesure d'être soignés dans un hopital mourront!Und beachte bitte, dass verwundete Soldaten sterben, wenn sie die Kapazität deines Krankenhauses übersteigen.E lembre-se de que todas as unidades feridas que estão além da capacidade do Hospital morrerão.請一定記住，超出醫院容量的傷兵將會死亡。And please bear in mind, the wounded soldiers not in the hospital’s capacity will die.และโปรดจำไว้ว่า ทหารตัวไหนที่บาดเจ็บแต่ไม่ได้เข้าโรงพยาบาลจะต้องตายTen en cuenta que los soldados heridos que el hospital no pueda atender morirán.И, пожалуйста, имейте в виду, что любые раненые войска, находящиеся за пределами Госпиталя, умрут.And please bear in mind, any injured units that are beyond the Hospital's capacity will die.And please bear in mind, the wounded soldiers not in the hospital’s capacity will die.And please bear in mind, the wounded soldiers not in the hospital’s capacity will die.And please bear in mind, the wounded soldiers not in the hospital’s capacity will die.And please bear in mind, the wounded soldiers not in the hospital’s capacity will die.And please bear in mind, the wounded soldiers not in the hospital’s capacity will die.And please bear in mind, the wounded soldiers not in the hospital’s capacity will die.请一定记住，超出医院容量的伤兵将会死亡。
108
10111001078_1_3所以记得及时升级或是建造更多的医院，这样你的士兵就不会死亡了So remember to build more hospitals or upgrade them in time, so that your soldiers won’t get killed in combat.Pensez donc à construire plus d'hôpitaux ou à les améliorer, cela évitera que vos soldats ne soient tués au combat.Denk also daran, mehr Krankenhäuser zu bauen oder sie rechtzeitig aufzuwerten, damit deine Soldaten im Einsatz nicht sterben.Lembre-se de construir mais hospitais ou aprimorá-los, para que suas unidades não morram devido ao combate.所以記得及時升級或是建造更多的醫院，這樣你的士兵就不會死亡了So remember to build more hospitals or upgrade them in time, so that your soldiers won’t get killed in combat.ดังนั้น อย่าลืมสร้างโรงพยาบาลหรืออัปเกรดให้ทันใช้ด้วย คุณจะได้ไม่ต้องเสียเพื่อนร่วมรบไปในการต่อสู้Recuerda construir más hospitales o mejorarlos oportunamente, para evitar que tus soldados mueran en combate.Не забывайте строить больше госпиталей или улучшать их, чтобы ваши войска не были убиты в бою.Remember to build more hospitals or upgrade them, so that your units won't be killed due to combat.So remember to build more hospitals or upgrade them in time, so that your soldiers won’t get killed in combat.So remember to build more hospitals or upgrade them in time, so that your soldiers won’t get killed in combat.So remember to build more hospitals or upgrade them in time, so that your soldiers won’t get killed in combat.So remember to build more hospitals or upgrade them in time, so that your soldiers won’t get killed in combat.So remember to build more hospitals or upgrade them in time, so that your soldiers won’t get killed in combat.So remember to build more hospitals or upgrade them in time, so that your soldiers won’t get killed in combat.所以记得及时升级或是建造更多的医院，这样你的士兵就不会死亡了
109
10111001089_1_1哦！我看到了什么，一个酒馆？！Oh! See what I just found? A Tavern!?Oh! Regardez ce que je viens de trouver! Une taverne!?Oh! Was sehen meine Augen da? Eine Taverne!?Oh! Viu o que acabei de encontrar? Uma taverna!?哦！我看到了什麼，一個酒館？！Oh! See what I just found? A Tavern!?โอ้! ดูสิ ว่าฉันเจออะไร โรงแรม!¡Oh! ¿Ves lo que acabo de encontrar? ¿¡Una taberna!?Ух ты! Видите, что я только что нашёл? Таверна!?Oh! See what I've just found? A Tavern!?Oh! See what I just found? A Tavern!?Oh! See what I just found? A Tavern!?Oh! See what I just found? A Tavern!?Oh! See what I just found? A Tavern!?Oh! See what I just found? A Tavern!?Oh! See what I just found? A Tavern!?哦！我看到了什么，一个酒馆？！

10111001099_1_2简直就是哥布林们【修改】的最爱！哦……仅次于金币【修改】的最爱……It must be every primate’s favourite! Umm, a little correction… favourite except bananas!Ce doit être le préféré de tous les primates! Umm, une petite correction… préféré à l'exception des bananes!Jeder Affe mag die Taverne am liebsten! Ähm … Na ja, direkt nach Bananen!Deve ser o que os macacos mais gostam! Umm, com uma pequena correção... do que mais gostam depois de bananas!簡直就是猴子們的最愛！哦……僅次於金币【修改】的最愛……It must be every primate’s favourite! Umm, a little correction… favourite except bananas!มันจะต้องเป็นสถานที่โปรดของพวกลิงทุกตัวแน่! อืม ขอแก้ไขสักหน่อย ของโปรด…รองจากกล้วยนะ!¡Debe ser lo que más les gusta a los primates! Ah, déjame hacer una corrección. ¡Lo que más les gusta después de las bananas!Это должно быть любимое среди всех обезьян! Хмм, поправка... их любимое после бананов!It must be every monkey's favorite! Umm, a little correction... their favorite besides bananas!It must be every primate’s favourite! Umm, a little correction… favourite except bananas!It must be every primate’s favourite! Umm, a little correction… favourite except bananas!It must be every primate’s favourite! Umm, a little correction… favourite except bananas!It must be every primate’s favourite! Umm, a little correction… favourite except bananas!It must be every primate’s favourite! Umm, a little correction… favourite except bananas!It must be every primate’s favourite! Umm, a little correction… favourite except bananas!简直就是哥布林们【修改】的最爱！哦……仅次于金币【修改】的最爱……

10111001109_1_3不得不说，你是一个很优秀的领导者。你很了解自己的猴民们想要的是什么。快一起进去嗨一场吧！I must admit that you’re an excellent leader! You know what citizens really want! Hurry, get in and enjoy a happy night!Je dois admettre que vous êtes un excellent leader! Vous savez ce que les citoyens veulent! Dépêchez-vous, entrez et profitez d'une bonne nuit!Ich muss zugeben, dass du ein ausgezeichneter Anführer bist! Du weißt, was unsere Bande wirklich will. Na los, rein mit dir und genieß den Abend!Devo admitir que você é um excelente líder! Você tem certeza do que nossos cidadãos primatas realmente querem! Depressa, entre e desfrute de uma noite feliz!不得不說，你是一個很優秀的領導者。你很瞭解自己的猴民們想要的是什麼。快一起進去嗨一場吧！I must admit that you’re an excellent leader! You know what citizens really want! Hurry, get in and enjoy a happy night!ฉันต้องยอมรับว่าคุณเป็นผู้นำที่ยอดเยี่ยมจริง ๆ! คุณรู้ว่าพลพรรคต้องการอะไร! เร็วเข้า เข้ามาข้างในแล้วสนุกไปกับค่ำคืนแสนสุขนี้กัน!¡Debo admitir que eres un excelente líder! ¡Tienes muy claro lo que quieren nuestros ciudadanos! ¡Date prisa, entra y disfruta la noche!Я должен признать, что вы отличный лидер! Вы понимаете, чего действительно хотят наши граждане приматы! Поспешите, включайтесь и наслаждайтесь прекрасной ночью!I must admit it that you’re an excellent leader! You’re sure about what our primate citizens really want! Hurry, get in and enjoy a happy night!I must admit that you’re an excellent leader! You know what citizens really want! Hurry, get in and enjoy a happy night!I must admit that you’re an excellent leader! You know what citizens really want! Hurry, get in and enjoy a happy night!I must admit that you’re an excellent leader! You know what citizens really want! Hurry, get in and enjoy a happy night!I must admit that you’re an excellent leader! You know what citizens really want! Hurry, get in and enjoy a happy night!I must admit that you’re an excellent leader! You know what citizens really want! Hurry, get in and enjoy a happy night!I must admit that you’re an excellent leader! You know what citizens really want! Hurry, get in and enjoy a happy night!不得不说，你是一个很优秀的领导者。你很了解自己的猴民们想要的是什么。快一起进去嗨一场吧！

10111001119_1_4哦！啤酒、威士忌，还有我最爱的……金币【修改】味果汁！Ah! Beer, whisky and what I love the most… banana juice!Ah! Bière, whisky et ce que j'aime le plus ... jus de fruit saveur banane!Ah! Bier, Whiskey und mein persönlicher Favorit … Bananensaft!Ah! Cerveja, uísque e o que eu mais amo... suco de banana!哦！啤酒、威士忌，還有我最愛的……金币【修改】味果汁！Ah! Beer, whisky and what I love the most… banana juice!อา! เบียร์ วิสกี้ และเครื่องดื่มสุดโปรดของฉัน…น้ำกล้วย!¡Ah! Cerveza, whisky y lo que más me gusta… ¡jugo de banana!Ах! Пиво, вино, и то, что я люблю больше всего... сок со вкусом банана!Ah! Beer, whiskey, and what I love the most... banana-flavor juice!Ah! Beer, whisky and what I love the most… banana juice!Ah! Beer, whisky and what I love the most… banana juice!Ah! Beer, whisky and what I love the most… banana juice!Ah! Beer, whisky and what I love the most… banana juice!Ah! Beer, whisky and what I love the most… banana juice!Ah! Beer, whisky and what I love the most… banana juice!哦！啤酒、威士忌，还有我最爱的……金币【修改】味果汁！
113
10111001129_1_5不过这是美食家们费尽心思勾兑的味道，远不及真正的金币【修改】美味。But I have to say, diluted with materials, the flavour is just the result of many gourmets’ efforts. It’s not as delicious as real bananas.Mais je dois avouer que cet arôme synthétique est loin d'être aussi délicieux que de vraies bananes.Ich muss aber sagen, so verdünnt mit den anderen Zutaten ist der Geschmack nur das Ergebnis der Bemühungen vieler Feinschmecker. An den Geschmack echter Bananen kommt das nicht heran.Mas preciso dizer que, diluído com ingredientes, o sabor é resultado dos esforços de muitos chefs. Não é tão delicioso quanto bananas de verdade.不過這是美食家們費盡心思勾兌的味道，遠不及真正的金币【修改】美味。But I have to say, diluted with materials, the flavour is just the result of many gourmets’ efforts. It’s not as delicious as real bananas.แต่ฉันต้องขอบอกนะว่า พวกวัสดุต่าง ๆ ที่เอามาผสม ๆ กันเนี่ย รสชาติที่ได้มันก็แค่เป็นผลลัพธ์จากความพยายามของเหล่านักชิมเท่านั้นแหละ มันไม่อร่อยเหมือนกล้วยจริงหรอกDebo decir que, diluido con otros ingredientes, el sabor solo es el resultado del esfuerzo de muchos conocedores. No es tan delicioso como una banana de verdad.Но я должен сказать, что, разбавленный ингредиентами, аромат является лишь результатом усилий многих шеф-поваров. Это не так вкусно, как настоящие бананы.But I have to say, diluted with ingredients, the flavor is just the result of many chefs' efforts. It’s not as delicious as real bananas.But I have to say, diluted with materials, the flavour is just the result of many gourmets’ efforts. It’s not as delicious as real bananas.But I have to say, diluted with materials, the flavour is just the result of many gourmets’ efforts. It’s not as delicious as real bananas.But I have to say, diluted with materials, the flavour is just the result of many gourmets’ efforts. It’s not as delicious as real bananas.But I have to say, diluted with materials, the flavour is just the result of many gourmets’ efforts. It’s not as delicious as real bananas.But I have to say, diluted with materials, the flavour is just the result of many gourmets’ efforts. It’s not as delicious as real bananas.But I have to say, diluted with materials, the flavour is just the result of many gourmets’ efforts. It’s not as delicious as real bananas.不过这是美食家们费尽心思勾兑的味道，远不及真正的金币【修改】美味。
114
10111001139_1_6这可是个好地方，你可以在这里到处逛逛、找猴聊天，或许能得到一些有趣的礼物。However, it’s still a great place! Just look around and find some primates to talk. I’m sure you are charming enough to win yourself some funny gifts.Mais c’est quand même un super endroit! Regardez autour de vous et trouvez des primates à qui parler. Ils ont certainement tout un tas de choses interessantes à vous proposer.Aber der Ort hier ist trotzdem klasse! Sieh dich doch etwas um und unterhalte dich mit ein oder zwei Primaten. Ich bin sicher, dass du mit deinem Charm ein paar witzige Geschenke abgreifen kannst.No entanto, ainda é um ótimo lugar! Basta olhar em volta e encontrar alguns primatas para conversar. Tenho certeza de que você é charmoso o suficiente para ganhar alguns presentes legais.這可是個好地方，你可以在這裡到處逛逛、找猴聊天，或許能得到一些有趣的禮物。However, it’s still a great place! Just look around and find some primates to talk. I’m sure you are charming enough to win yourself some funny gifts.แต่ก็นะ มันก็ยังเป็นสถานที่ที่เจ๋งอยู่ดีแหละ! ลองมองไปรอบ ๆ และหาเหล่าลิงเพื่อคุยด้วยสิ ฉันแน่ใจว่าคุณมีเสน่ห์พอที่จะได้รับของขวัญแสนสนุกนะSin embargo, ¡este lugar es genial! Ve a dar una vuelta y tal vez encuentres a otros primates para charlar. No dudo que tu encanto te valga algunos graciosos regalos.Но я должен сказать, что, разбавленный ингредиентами, аромат является лишь результатом усилий многих шеф-поваров. Это не так вкусно, как настоящие бананы.However, it’s still a great place! Just look around and find some primates to talk to. I’m sure you're charming enough to earn yourself some funny gifts.However, it’s still a great place! Just look around and find some primates to talk. I’m sure you are charming enough to win yourself some funny gifts.However, it’s still a great place! Just look around and find some primates to talk. I’m sure you are charming enough to win yourself some funny gifts.However, it’s still a great place! Just look around and find some primates to talk. I’m sure you are charming enough to win yourself some funny gifts.However, it’s still a great place! Just look around and find some primates to talk. I’m sure you are charming enough to win yourself some funny gifts.However, it’s still a great place! Just look around and find some primates to talk. I’m sure you are charming enough to win yourself some funny gifts.However, it’s still a great place! Just look around and find some primates to talk. I’m sure you are charming enough to win yourself some funny gifts.这可是个好地方，你可以在这里到处逛逛、找猴聊天，或许能得到一些有趣的礼物。
115
101110011410_1_1唔，这次的升级需要时间较长，要耐心等待。We have a rocket to launch, a city to develop, no time to wait!On a une fusée à lancer, de l'uranium à ramasser… pas le temps d'attendre!Wir müssen eine Rakete starten und eine Stadt entwickeln. Wir haben keine Zeit, zu warten!Temos um foguete para lançar e uma cidade para desenvolver, não dá para perder tempo!我們要發射火箭，還要發展城鎮，可不能虛耗時間！Kita punya roket untuk diluncurkan, kota untuk dikembangkan, kita harus cepat!เรามีจรวดที่ต้องปล่อย และเมืองที่ต้องพัฒนา เราไม่มีเวลาชักช้าอีกแล้ว!¡Tenemos un cohete por lanzar, una ciudad que desarrollar y ningún tiempo que perder!Нам надо развивать город и запустить ракету. Нет времени ждать!Fırlatmamız gereken bir roket ve geliştirmemiz gereken bir şehir var, bekleyecek zamanımız ise yok.Chúng ta có một quả hỏa tiễn cần phóng, một thành phố cần phát triển và không có thời gian để chờ đợi đâu!Abbiamo un Razzo da lanciare, una città da espandere e nessun tempo da perdere!Mamy rakietę do wystrzelenia, miasto do zagospodarowania, nie ma czasu na czekanie!لدينا صاروخ نطلقه، مدينة يجب تطويرها، لا وقت للانتظار!ふむ、今回のアップグレードは時間がかかるな……我慢だぞ、我慢。흐음, 이번 업그레이드는 시간이 오래 걸리니 인내심을 가지고 기다려 주세요.唔，这次的升级需要时间较长，要耐心等待。
116
101110011510_1_2……什么？才过去了2秒？！我以为已经过去了半个世纪！We must gear up if we want to win this race.Faut se dépécher pour gagner cette course.Wir müssen uns ordentlich ausrüsten, wenn wir diesen Wettlauf gewinnen wollen.Se a gente quer ganhar essa corrida, precisa se preparar.我們必須加快速度，才能贏得競賽。Kita harus bersiap jika ingin memenangkan perlombaan ini.เราต้องใส่สุดเกียร์หากเราต้องการชนะการแข่งขันนี้Tenemos que equiparnos si queremos ir al espacio.Мы должны снарядиться, если хотим выиграть эту гонку.Bu yarışı kazanmak istiyorsak harekete geçmeliyiz.Chúng ta phải tăng cường trang bị nếu muốn chiến thắng cuộc đua này.Dobbiamo attrezzarci se vogliamo vincere questa corsa.Musimy się przygotować, jeśli chcemy wygrać ten wyścig.يجب أن نستعد إذا أردنا الفوز في هذا السباق.……ん？たった2秒しか経ってないのか！？半世紀が過ぎていった気分だよ。... 아직 2초밖에 안 지났다고요?! 벌써 반세기는 지난 줄 알았는데!……什么？才过去了2秒？！我以为已经过去了半个世纪！
117
101110011610_1_3是时候拿出我们的宝贝了——加速道具，它能瞬间减少队列的等待时间，简直是急性子的救星！It’s time to use our secret weapon – Speedups! They’ll reduce waiting times!Voilà une arme secrète : les accélérateurs! Ils réduisent le temps d'attente.Damit ist die Zeit für unsere Geheimwaffe gekommen – Beschleunigungen! Damit verkürzen wir Wartezeiten!É hora de usar nossa arma secreta: aceleradores! Eles reduzem o tempo de espera!是時候祭出我們的秘密武器了–加速道具！它們可以幫我們減少等待的時間！Waktunya untuk menggunakan senjata rahasia kita – Percepatan! Itu akan mengurangi waktu menunggu!ได้เวลาใช้อาวุธลับของเราแล้วนั่นคือ - การเร่งเวลา! ที่จะช่วยลดเวลาการรอคอยได้!Es hora de usar nuestra arma secreta: ¡Aceleraciones! ¡Pueden reducir los tiempos de espera!Пора использовать наше секретное оружие — ускорения! Они снижают время ожидания.Gizli silahımız olan Hızlandırıcıları kullanma zamanı! Bekleme zamanlarını azaltacaklar!Đã đến lúc sử dụng món vũ khí bí mật của chúng ta – Tăng Tốc! Chúng sẽ giúp giảm thời gian chờ đợi!È ora di usare la nostra arma segreta: gli Acceleratori! Ridurranno i tempi di attesa!Nadszedł czas, aby użyć naszej tajnej broni – Przyspieszeń! Skrócą czas oczekiwania!حان الوقت لاستخدام سلاحنا السري - التسريعات! سوف يقللون من أوقات الانتظار!仕方ない、僕のとっておきを見せてやろう――その名も、加速アイテム！待ち時間をあっという間に減らしてくれるんだ！まさに、せっかちどもの福音だな！우리의 보물을 꺼낼 때가 된 것 같네요. 그건 바로 가속 아이템! 대기 시간을 순식간에 단축해 줄 수 있습니다.是时候拿出我们的宝贝了——加速道具，它能瞬间减少队列的等待时间，简直是急性子的救星！
118
101110011710_1_4做得好！合理使用加速道具让城市更快速地发展。而这也意味着，我们能更快地接近亲爱的金币【修改】！Well done! Use Speedups properly to make the city develop faster!Bravo! Utilisez ces accélérateurs pour vous développer plus vite.Gut gemacht! Nutze Beschleunigungen weise und treibe die Entwicklung der Stadt voran!Boa! Use aceleradores para desenvolver a cidade mais rapidamente!做得好！適當使用加速道具可以令城鎮發展得更快！Bagus! Gunakan Percepatan secara bijak untuk mengembangkan kota dengan cepat!ดีมาก! ใช้การเร่งเวลาอย่างถูกต้องเพื่อให้เมืองพัฒนาเร็วขึ้น!¡Bien hecho! ¡Usa Aceleraciones para que la ciudad se desarrolle más rápido!Отлично! Используйте ускорения правильно, и город будет развиваться быстрее!Tebrikler! Şehrin daha hızlı gelişmesini sağlamak için Hızlandırıcıları doğru kullan!Làm tốt lắm! Hãy sử dụng Tăng Tốc một cách hợp lý để phát triển thành phố nhanh hơn!Ben fatto! Usa gli Acceleratori per velocizzare lo sviluppo della città!Dobra robota! Używaj odpowiednio Przyspieszeń, aby miasto rozwijało się szybciej!أحسنت! استخدم التسريعات بشكل صحيح لجعل المدينة تتطور بشكل أسرع!いいぞ！加速アイテムを合理的に使えば、街を素早く発展させられる。つまり、僕たちの愛するバナナに、いち早くありつけるってわけだ！잘했어요! 가속 아이템을 적절히 사용하면 도시를 더 빠르게 발전시킬 수 있습니다. 그건 곧 우리가 사랑하는 바나나에 더 빨리 다가갈 수 있다는 뜻이고요!做得好！合理使用加速道具让城市更快速地发展。而这也意味着，我们能更快地接近亲爱的金币【修改】！

101110012312_1_1如果想要同时修建两个建筑，可以雇佣第二建筑队列，加快城市发展If you want to build two facilities together, it’s suggested to unlock the 2nd Construction Queue. Double developing speed!Si vous souhaitez construire deux installations en même temps vous devrez déverrouiller la 2e file de construction. Vitesse de développement doublée!Wenn du zwei Gebäude gleichzeitig bauen möchtest, solltest du die zweite Bauwarteschlange freischalten. Das verdoppelt dein Entwicklungstempo!Se você deseja construir dois edifícios juntos, sugiro que desbloqueie a 2ª Fila de Construção. Dobre sua velocidade de desenvolvimento!如果想要同時修建兩個建築，可以僱傭第二建築佇列，加快城市發展If you want to build two facilities together, it’s suggested to unlock the 2nd Construction Queue. Удвойте скорость вашего развития!If you want to build two buildings together, it's suggested unlocking the 2nd Building Queue. 101110012513_1_2什么？蟑螂？不！那种不堪一击的玩意儿早就在核污染中死绝了！What? Cockroach? The fragile things died down long ago in the nuclear pollution!What? Cockroach? The fragile things died down long ago in the nuclear pollution!Was? Kakerlaken? Ach Quatsch, diese kleinen zerbrechlichen Dinger sind doch vor langer Zeit an der nuklearen Verpestung zugrunde gegangen!O que? Baratas? As coisas frágeis foram erradicadas há muito tempo devido à poluição nuclear!什麼？蟑螂？不！那種不堪一擊的玩意兒早就在核汙染中死絕了！What? Cockroach? The fragile things died down long ago in the nuclear pollution!ว่าอะไร มีกะจั๊วะเรอะ พวกอ่อนแอก็พ่ายแพ้ไปนานแล้วเนื่องจากมลพิษนิวเคลียร์!¿Qué? ¿Cucarachas? ¡Esos bichos frágiles se extinguieron hace mucho tiempo, por la contaminación nuclear!Что? Тараканы? Хрупкие вещи были давно уничтожены из-за ядерного загрязнения!What? Cockroaches? The fragile things were eradicated long ago due to the nuclear pollution!What? Cockroach? The fragile things died down long ago in the nuclear pollution!What? Cockroach? The fragile things died down long ago in the nuclear pollution!What? Cockroach? The fragile things died down long ago in the nuclear pollution!What? Cockroach? The fragile things died down long ago in the nuclear pollution!What? Cockroach? The fragile things died down long ago in the nuclear pollution!What? Cockroach? The fragile things died down long ago in the nuclear pollution!什么？蟑螂？不！那种不堪一击的玩意儿早就在核污染中死绝了！

101110012613_1_3我现在要说的是一件更现实而迫切的事……你不觉得咱们的城市现在就像塞满鱼丁的罐头，太——挤了吗？What I’m going to talk about is much more urgent and practical… don’t you think our current city is just like a small can filled with sardine? It’s too crowded!What I’m going to talk about is much more urgent and practical... don’t you think our current city is just like a small can filled with sardine? It’s too crowded!Das Problem, von dem ich spreche, ist viel dringender und pragmatischer. Meinst du nicht, dass wir in dieser Stadt leben wie die Sardinen in der Dose? Es ist viel zu eng!O que eu vou falar é muito mais urgente e prático... você não acha que a nossa cidade atual é como uma lata pequena cheia de sardinha? Está muito lotada!我現在要說的是一件更現實而迫切的事……你不覺得咱們的城市現在就像塞滿魚丁的罐頭，太——擠了嗎？What I’m going to talk about is much more urgent and practical… don’t you think our current city is just like a small can filled with sardine? Он переполнен!What I’m going to talk about is much more urgent and practical... don’t you think our current city is like a small can filled with sardines? 101110012713_1_4你或许可以砍掉一些碍路的树木。毕竟我们现在都住房子，不睡树上了。Perhaps you should cut down some trees in the way. After all, we don’t live in trees anymore, we want houses!Perhaps you should cut down some trees in the way. Queremos casas!你或許可以砍掉一些礙路的樹木。畢竟我們現在都住房子，不睡樹上了。Perhaps you should cut down some trees in the way. Después de todo, ya no vivimos en ellos. ¡Queremos casas!Возможно, вы должны срубить несколько деревьев на пути. В конце концов, мы больше не живём на деревьях. 101110012814_1_1Research Lab是科学家们为城市贡献脑力的地方。我们的生活与战斗力的提升都离不开科技的发展。Our scientists are working in the Research Lab, and their brains have contributed a lot to our city. If you want to live a better life or give a good kick on bad primates’ asses, you’re counting on technologies.Our scientists are working in the Research Lab, and their brains have contributed a lot to our city. If you want to live a better life or give a good kick on bad primates’ asses, you’re counting on technologies.Unsere Wissenschaftler arbeiten im Forschungslabor. Ihren Gehirnen hat unsere Stadt viel zu verdanken. Wenn du dein Leben verbessern möchtest oder ein paar üblen Primaten gehörig in den Hintern treten möchtest, solltest du auf Technologien vertrauen.Nossos cientistas estão trabalhando no Laboratório de Pesquisa e suas mentes contribuíram muito para a nossa cidade. Se você quer viver uma vida melhor ou dar uma boa surra em primatas maus, conte com tecnologias.ResearchLab是科學家們為城市貢獻腦力的地方。我們的生活與戰力的提升都離不開科技的發展。Our scientists are working in the Research Lab, and their brains have contributed a lot to our city. If you want to live a better life or give a good kick on bad primates’ asses, you’re counting on technologies.นักวิทยาศาสตร์ของเรากำลังทำงานง่วนอยู่ในห้องวิจัย ซึ่งความรู้ของพวกเขามีส่วนสำคัญต่อเมืองของเราอย่างมาก หากคุณต้องการมีชีวิตที่ดีกว่าเดิมหรือจัดการกับพวกลิงพาลล่ะก็ คุณต้องพึ่งเทคโนโลยีNuestros científicos están trabajando en el laboratorio de investigación. Han puesto sus cerebros al servicio de la ciudad. Si quieres vivir una vida mejor o darles una buena paliza a primates malos, la tecnología está de tu lado.Наши учёные работают в Исследовательской Лаборатории, и их умы внесли большой вклад в наш город. Если вы хотите жить лучше или хорошенько навалять плохим приматам, вы должны рассчитывать на технологии.Our scientists are working in the Research Lab, and their minds have contributed a lot to our city. If you want to live a better life or give a good whoopin' on bad primates, you’re counting on technologies.Our scientists are working in the Research Lab, and their brains have contributed a lot to our city. If you want to live a better life or give a good kick on bad primates’ asses, you’re counting on technologies.Our scientists are working in the Research Lab, and their brains have contributed a lot to our city. If you want to live a better life or give a good kick on bad primates’ asses, you’re counting on technologies.Our scientists are working in the Research Lab, and their brains have contributed a lot to our city. If you want to live a better life or give a good kick on bad primates’ asses, you’re counting on technologies.Our scientists are working in the Research Lab, and their brains have contributed a lot to our city. If you want to live a better life or give a good kick on bad primates’ asses, you’re counting on technologies.Our scientists are working in the Research Lab, and their brains have contributed a lot to our city. If you want to live a better life or give a good kick on bad primates’ asses, you’re counting on technologies.Our scientists are working in the Research Lab, and their brains have contributed a lot to our city. If you want to live a better life or give a good kick on bad primates’ asses, you’re counting on technologies.Research Lab是科学家们为城市贡献脑力的地方。我们的生活与战斗力的提升都离不开科技的发展。
130
101110012914_1_2记住，我们的征程是寻找宇宙中的金币【修改】，可不是下地插秧。Remember, our conquest is the space of bananas! Not planting wheat on the ground!Remember, our conquest is the space of bananas! Not planting wheat on the ground!Denk daran, wir wollen den Weltraum für Bananen erobern und nicht Getreide anbauen!Lembre-se, nossa conquista é o espaço das bananas! Não semear arroz no chão!記住，我們的征程是尋找宇宙中的金币【修改】，可不是下地插秧。Remember, our conquest is the space of bananas! Not planting wheat on the ground!แต่จำไว้นะว่า สิ่งที่เราต้องพิชิตให้ได้คือ อวกาศที่อุดมไปด้วยกล้วย! ไม่ใช่การปลูกข้าวสาลีบนพื้นดิน!¡Recuerda, nuestra conquista son las bananas espaciales! ¡No sembrar arroz en la tierra!Помните, наш путь - это космос бананов! А не сеять рис в землю!Remember, our conquest is the space of bananas! Not sowing rice in the ground!Remember, our conquest is the space of bananas! Not planting wheat on the ground!Remember, our conquest is the space of bananas! Not planting wheat on the ground!Remember, our conquest is the space of bananas! Not planting wheat on the ground!Remember, our conquest is the space of bananas! Not planting wheat on the ground!Remember, our conquest is the space of bananas! Not planting wheat on the ground!Remember, our conquest is the space of bananas! Not planting wheat on the ground!记住，我们的征程是寻找宇宙中的金币【修改】，可不是下地插秧。
131
101110013015_1_1在危险的荒野，孤立可不是什么好事！拓荒猴基地通常结成联盟【修改】守望相助！This is a dangerous world. Monkeys form Gangs to help each other and become stronger!C'est un monde dangereux. Pour s'entraider, les singes unissent leur force en formant des gangs.Diese Welt ist gefährlich. Affen bilden Clans, um sich gegenseitig zu helfen und stärker zu werden!Este é um mundo perigoso. Macacos formam gangues para ajudar uns aos outros a ficar mais fortes!世界很危險。猴子們會組織幫派，互相幫助，加強實力。Ini dunia yang berbahaya. Kera membuat Geng agar bisa saling membantu dan menjadi lebih kuat!นี่คือโลกที่อันตราย เจ้าจ๋อรวมแก๊งค์ขึ้นเพื่อช่วยเหลือซึ่งกันและกันและกลายเป็นผู้ที่แข็งแกร่งขึ้น!Este es un mundo peligroso. ¡Los monos forman Bandas para ayudarse entre sí y volverse más fuertes!Это опасный мир. Обезьяны собираются в банды, чтобы помогать друг другу и становиться сильнее!Burası tehlikeli bir dünya. Maymunlar birbirlerine yardım etmek ve güçlenmek için Çeteler kurarlar!Đây là một thế giới nguy hiểm. Khỉ nên thành lập Bang Hội để giúp đỡ lẫn nhau và trở nên mạnh mẽ hơn!Questo è un mondo pericoloso. Le scimmie formano Gang per aiutarsi a vicenda e diventare più forti!To jest niebezpieczny świat. Małpy tworzą Gangi, aby pomagać sobie nawzajem i stać się silniejszymi!هذا عالم خطير. القرود تشكل عصابات لمساعدة بعضها البعض لتصبح أقوى!危険な荒野での孤軍奮闘は、おすすめしないな！開拓者たちは、通常「ギルド」を結成してお互いを助け合うんだ！위험한 황야에서 고립되는 건 결코 좋은 일이 아닙니다! 개척 원숭이 기지는 보통 무리를 형성해 서로 망보는 걸 도와줍니다!在危险的荒野，孤立可不是什么好事！拓荒猴基地通常结成联盟【修改】守望相助！
132
101110013115_1_2作为一个优秀的基地领袖，是时候加入一个联盟【修改】了！As a leader, it's time for you to join a Gang!En tant que chef, il est temps de rejoindre un gang!Als Anführer ist es für dich an der Zeit, einem Clan beizutreten!Como um líder, é hora de você entrar em uma gangue!身為猴群的首領，你是時候要加入一個幫派了！Sebagai pemimpin, sekarang waktunya untuk bergabung dengan Geng!ในฐานะที่เป็นผู้นำ ถึงเวลาของคุณที่จะเข้าร่วมแก๊งค์ได้แล้ว!Como líder, ¡ha llegado el momento de que te unas a una Banda!И вам, как лидеру, тоже пора вступить в банду!Bir lider olarak, bir Çeteye katılma sırası sende!Với tư cách là một nhà lãnh đạo, đã đến lúc bạn tham gia một Bang Hội!In qualità di scimmia influente, è ora che tu ti unisca a una Gang!Nadszedł czas, abyś dołączył do Gangu jako przywódca!كقائد، حان الوقت لكي تنضم إلى عصابة!優秀な基地のリーダーとして、そろそろギルドに加入しておこうか！이젠 훌륭한 기지의 리더로서 무리에 합류할 시간입니다!作为一个优秀的基地领袖，是时候加入一个联盟【修改】了！
133
101110013215_1_3虽然他们的自负导致了他们的灭亡，不过，他们有些优点还是值得我们学习的Meet up with other ruthless apes. Don’t be a loner, find your pack, buddy.Ne soyez pas timides, allez vers les autres, ça sera bien utile.Triff dich mit anderen rücksichtslosen Primaten. Sei kein Einzelgänger, Kumpel. Finde deine Bande!Encontre outros macacos implacáveis. Evite a solidão e ache a sua turma, camarada.跟其他無情的猿猴見個面吧。別當獨行俠了，找個團抱抱吧，老友。Bertemulah dengan kera buas lainnya. Jangan jadi penyendiri, pergilah, kawan.หากต้องไปเจอกับพวกลิงโฉดทั้งหลาย นายอย่าไปตัวเดียวล่ะเพื่อน ไปหาฝูงซะReúnete con otros primates implacables. No seas un solitario, encuentra tu manada, amigo.Вам надо встретиться с другими безжалостными приматами. Не стоит сражаться в одиночку. Найдите свою стаю!Başka acımasız maymunlarla tanış. Tek başına takılma, kendine arkadaşlar bul dostum.Hãy gặp gỡ các chúa vượn tàn bạo khác. Đừng đơn thương độc mã, hãy tìm đến bầy đàn, bạn ạ.Meet up with other ruthless apes. Don’t be a loner, find your pack, buddy.Meet up with other ruthless apes. Don’t be a loner, find your pack, buddy.Meet up with other ruthless apes. Don’t be a loner, find your pack, buddy.Meet up with other ruthless apes. Don’t be a loner, find your pack, buddy.Meet up with other ruthless apes. Don’t be a loner, find your pack, buddy.虽然他们的自负导致了他们的灭亡，不过，他们有些优点还是值得我们学习的
134
101110013315_1_4试着创建或者加入一个联盟【修改】吧，和盟友互相帮助，并肩作战，一同成长，为了金币【修改】！Join a Gang or create one! Gang members help each other, fight and develop together!Rejoignez un gang ou créez-en un! A plusieurs, on s'aide et on se développe plus vite.Tritt einem Clan bei oder erstelle selbst eins! Clan-Mitglieder helfen einander, kämpfen Seite an Seite und entwickeln sich gemeinsam!Junte-se a uma gangue ou crie uma! Membros de gangues ajudam uns aos outros, lutam e se desenvolvem juntos!加入一個幫派，或者自己建立一個！幫派成員會互相協助，一同戰鬥和發展！Bergabunglah dengan Geng atau kamu bisa membuatnya! Anggota Geng akan saling membantu, berjuang, dan berkembang bersama!เข้าร่วมแก๊งค์หรือไม่ก็สร้างแก๊งค์ขึ้นมาเองเลย! สมาชิกแก๊งค์จะช่วยเหลือซึ่งกันและกัน ต่อสู้และพัฒนาร่วมกัน!¡Únete a una Banda o crea una! ¡Los miembros de la Banda se ayudan los unos a los otros, luchan y desarrollan en equipo!Вступайте в банду или создайте банду сами! Участники банды помогают друг другу и вместе сражаются и развиваются!Bir Çeteye katıl ya da kendininkini kur! Çete üyeleri birbirlerine yardım ederler, birlikte savaşır ve gelişirler!Hãy gia nhập hoặc tạo Bang Hội! Thành viên Bang Hội sẽ hỗ trợ nhau, cùng nhau chiến đấu và phát triển!Unisciti a una Gang o creane una! I membri della Gang si aiutando a vicenda, combattono e crescono insieme!Dołącz do Gangu lub go stwórz! Członkowie Gangu pomagają sobie, walczą i rozwijają się razem!انضم إلى عصابة أو أنشئ واحدة! أعضاء العصابة يساعدون بعضهم البعض، يقاتلون ويتطورون معًا!ギルドを設立するか、既存のギルドに参加してみてくれ。盟友たちと支え合い、肩を並べて戦い、共に成長を遂げる……すべてはバナナのために！무리를 만들거나 가입해 보세요. 동맹과 서로 돕고 전투를 치러내며 함께 성장하세요. 바나나를 위해!试着创建或者加入一个联盟【修改】吧，和盟友互相帮助，并肩作战，一同成长，为了金币【修改】！
135
101110013415_2_1恭喜，你成功加入了一个联盟【修改】。是时候给你简单介绍一下联盟【修改】相关的功能了。Congratulations! You’re in a Gang now! It’s time you know how it works.Excellent! Vous avez rejoint un gang! Voyons comment ça marche.Glückwunsch! Du bist jetzt Teil eines Clans! Dann wird es wohl Zeit, dir zu zeigen, wie die Dinge laufen.Parabéns! Agora você está em uma gangue! Hora de te ensinar como funciona.恭喜！你已加入一個幫派！是時候教你怎麼做了。Selamat! Kamu sudah bergabung dalam Geng! Waktunya untuk menunjukkanmu cara kerjanya.ยินดีด้วย! คุณเข้าร่วมแก๊งค์แล้ว! ถึงเวลาแสดงวิธีใช้ให้คุณเห็นสักหน่อยแล้ว¡Felicitaciones! ¡Te has unido a una Banda! Es hora de mostrarte cómo funciona.Поздравляю! Теперь вы в банде! Давайте посмотрим, как она работает.Tebrikler! Artık bir Çetedesin! Nasıl işlediğini öğrenme vakti.Xin chúc mừng! Hiện bạn đã trở thành một phần của Bang Hội! Đã đến lúc cho bạn xem cách thức hoạt động rồi.Congratulations! You’re in a Gang now! It’s time you know how it works.Congratulations! You’re in a Gang now! It’s time you know how it works.Congratulations! You’re in a Gang now! It’s time you know how it works.Congratulations! You’re in a Gang now! It’s time you know how it works.Congratulations! You’re in a Gang now! It’s time you know how it works.恭喜，你成功加入了一个联盟【修改】。是时候给你简单介绍一下联盟【修改】相关的功能了。
136
101110013515_2_2这里是联盟【修改】的基本信息This part displays key info, like who’s the leader and how much Uranium you’ve collected together.Là ce sont les infos principales, comme le nom du leader, et l'uranium ramassé ensemble.Hier werden die wichtigsten Infos angezeigt, unter anderem der Anführer und wie viel Uran ihr gemeinsam gesammelt habt.Essa parte exibe informações importantes, tipo quem é o líder e quanto urânio vocês coletaram juntos.這部分會顯示關鍵資訊，譬如誰是首領，還有你們合力收集了多少鈾料。Bagian ini menampilkan informasi penting, seperti nama pemimpin dan jumlah Uranium yang sudah dikumpulkan bersama.ส่วนนี้จะแสดงข้อมูลสำคัญ เช่น ใครเป็นผู้นำและคุณได้เก็บยูเรเนียมได้เท่าไรแล้วEsta sección muestra la información clave, quién es el líder y cuánto uranio se ha recolectado.Здесь показана ключевая информация — например, кто управляет бандой, и сколько урана вы собрали вместе.Bu bölüm önemli bilgileri gösteriyor; lider kim ve birlikte ne kadar Uranyum topladınız gibi şeyler.Phần này sẽ hiển thị các thông tin chính yếu, ví dụ như ai là thủ lĩnh và các bạn đã cùng nhau thu thập được bao nhiêu Uranium.Qui sono mostrate informazioni chiave, come chi è il Leader e quanto Uranio hanno raccolto.Ta część wyświetla kluczowe informacje, takie jak przywódca i liczba zebranego razem Uranu.يعرض هذا الجزء المعلومات الأساسية، مثل من هو القائد وكمية اليورانيوم التي جمعتها معًا.ここでギルドの基本情報を確認できる。이곳에서 무리의 기본 정보를 확인할 수 있습니다.这里是联盟【修改】的基本信息
137
101110013615_2_3这里是联盟【修改】内的各种功能，点击它们可以前往对应页面From there, you can access the main features of your Gang, tap on each one to explore!Ici, c'est pour accéder aux fonctions principales du gang. Essayez-les toutes!Von hier aus kannst du auf die Hauptfunktionen von Clans zugreifen. Berühre und erkunde sie alle!Dali, você pode acessar os recursos principais da sua gangue. Toque em cada um para explorar!你可以在這裡使用幫派的三項功能，點擊一項來看看吧！Kamu juga bisa mengakses fitur utama Gengmu, ketuk setiap fitur untuk menjelajahi!และจากตรงนั้น คุณสามารถเข้าถึงคุณสมบัติหลักของแก๊งค์ได้โดยการแตะที่แต่ละแท็บเพื่อเข้าดู!Desde ahí puedes acceder a las muchas funcionalidades de la Banda. ¡Tócalas para explorarlas!Отсюда вы можете использовать главные функции банды. Коснитесь каждой из них, чтобы узнать больше.Buradan Çetenin başlıca özelliklerine erişebilirsin, her birine dokunarak keşfet!Từ đó, bạn có thể truy cập các tính năng chính của Bang Hội, hãy nhấn vào một mục để khám phá!Da qui puoi accedere alle funzioni principali della tua Gang. Toccale per esplorarle!Tam możesz uzyskać dostęp do głównych funkcji swojego Gangu, dotknij każdej z nich, aby je poznać!من هناك، يمكنك الوصول إلى الميزات الرئيسية لعصابتك، انقر على كل واحدة لاستكشافها!こっちはギルドの各種機能だ。タップすれば対応する画面を開ける。그리고 이곳에선 무리의 각종 기능을 확인할 수 있습니다. 탭하면 해당 페이지로 이동합니다.这里是联盟【修改】内的各种功能，点击它们可以前往对应页面
138
101110013715_2_4点击这里的按钮可以切换到对应的标签页，包括联盟【修改】功能、联盟【修改】成员和联盟【修改】设置Use these 3 tabs to switch between Gang functions, member list and Settings.Ces 3 onglets affichent les fonctions, la liste des membres et les réglages du gang.Nutze diese drei Reiter um zwischen Clan-Funktionen, Mitgliederliste und Einstellungen hin- und her zu wechseln.Use essas 3 abas para alternar entre funções, lista de membros e configurações da gangue.用那3個分頁切換幫派運作、成員名單及設定。Gunakan 3 tab berikut untuk beralih antara fungsi Geng, daftar anggota, dan Pengaturan.ใช้แท็บทั้ง 3 แท็บนี้เพื่อสลับไปมาระหว่างฟังก์ชันของแก๊งค์ รายชื่อสมาชิก และการตั้งค่าUsa estas tres pestañas para alternar las funciones, la lista de miembros y los ajustes de la Banda.Эти три раздела позволяют переключаться между функциями банды, списком участников и настройками.Çete işlevleri, üye listesi ve Ayarlar arasında gidip gelmek için bu 3 sekmeyi kullan.Hãy sử dụng 3 thẻ để chuyển đổi giữa các chức năng của Bang Hội, danh sách thành viên và Thiết Lập.Usa queste 3 schede per passare tra le funzioni della Gang, l'elenco dei membri e le impostazioni.Użyj tych 3 kart, aby przełączać się między funkcjami Gangu, listą członków i ustawieniami.استخدم علامات التبويب الثلاثة هذه للتبديل بين وظائف العصابة وقائمة الأعضاء والإعدادات.ここをタップすると、ギルドの機能、ギルドメンバー、ギルド設定なんかの画面を素早く切り替えられるぞ。이 버튼을 탭하면 무리 기능, 무리 일원, 무리 설정 등 해당하는 페이지로 전환됩니다.点击这里的按钮可以切换到对应的标签页，包括联盟【修改】功能、联盟【修改】成员和联盟【修改】设置
139
101110013816_1_1俗话说远亲不如近邻，抱团取暖才是上策The men of the old world always said, “A good neighbour is better than a brother far off”. It’s better for you to get companied!Les hommes de l'ancien monde ont toujours dit: "Un bon voisin vaut mieux qu'un frère éloigné". Assurez vous d'être accompagné lors de vos aventures!Wie die Männer der alten Welt stets zu sagen pflegten: „Ein guter Nachbar ist besser als ein Bruder in der Ferne.“ Es ist Zeit, deine neuen Kameraden kennenzulernen!Os homens do velho mundo sempre diziam: "Um bom vizinho é melhor que um irmão distante". É melhor você conhecer!俗話說遠親不如近鄰，抱團取暖才是上策The men of the old world always said, “A good neighbour is better than a brother far off”. It’s better for you to get companied!มนุษย์ในโลกเก่าพูดเสมอว่า “เพื่อนบ้านใกล้ตัวย่อมดีกว่าพี่น้องที่อยู่ห่างไกล” มีเพื่อนไว้ ยังไงก็ฟิน!En el viejo mundo se dice: "un buen vecino es mejor que un hermano lejano". ¡Te conviene encontrar compañía!Люди старого мира всегда говорили: «Хороший сосед лучше далекого брата». Вам лучше встретиться!The men of the old world always said, “A good neighbor is better than a brother far off.” It’s better for you to meet!The men of the old world always said, “A good neighbour is better than a brother far off”. It’s better for you to get companied!The men of the old world always said, “A good neighbour is better than a brother far off”. It’s better for you to get companied!The men of the old world always said, “A good neighbour is better than a brother far off”. It’s better for you to get companied!The men of the old world always said, “A good neighbour is better than a brother far off”. It’s better for you to get companied!The men of the old world always said, “A good neighbour is better than a brother far off”. It’s better for you to get companied!The men of the old world always said, “A good neighbour is better than a brother far off”. It’s better for you to get companied!俗话说远亲不如近邻，抱团取暖才是上策
140
101110013916_1_2联盟【修改】成员的城市聚集在一起更方便你们互相帮助，你可以把城市传送到魁首附近，我打赌你的盟友们会开心地欢迎你！If the cities between Alliance members are near, you can help each other more conveniently. I bet a banana that you’ll be welcomed by the whole Alliance!Si les villes entre les membres de l'Alliance sont proches, vous pouvez vous entraider plus facilement. Je parie une banane que vous serez bien accueilli par toute l'Alliance!Wenn eure Städte sich in der Nähe zueinander befinden, könnt ihr euch viel leichter helfen. Ich wette um eine Banane, dass dich das ganze Bündnis mit offenen Armen willkommen heißt!Se as cidades entre os membros da Aliança estiverem próximas, é mais conveniente que vocês se ajudem. Ou você pode teleportar sua cidade diretamente para um local próximo ao líder da Aliança. Aposto que uma banana será bem-vinda por toda a Aliança!幫派成員的城市聚集在一起更方便你們互相幫助，你可以把城市傳送到魁首附近，我打賭你的盟友們會開心地歡迎你！If the cities between Alliance members are near, you can help each other more conveniently. I bet a banana that you’ll be welcomed by the whole Alliance!หากเมืองแต่ละเมืองของสมาชิกพันธมิตรอยู่ไม่ไกลกัน คุณจะสามารถช่วยเหลือซึ่งกันและกันได้สะดวกยิ่งขึ้น ฉันขอเอากล้วยเป็นประกันเลยว่าพันธมิตรทั้งพันธมิตรต้องยินดีต้อนรับนายแน่ ๆ!Si los miembros de la alianza se encuentran en ciudades cercanas, la colaboración resulta más conveniente. ¡Apuesto una banana que toda la alianza te dará la bienvenida!Если города участников Альянса находятся рядом, вам удобнее помогать друг другу. Или вы можете напрямую телепортировать свой город на локацию рядом с лидером Альянса. Готов поспорить на банан, что вам будет рад весь Альянс!If the cities between Alliance members are near, it’s more convenient for you to help each other. Or you can directly teleport your city to a location near the Alliance leader. I bet a banana that you’ll be welcomed by the entire Alliance!If the cities between Alliance members are near, you can help each other more conveniently. I bet a banana that you’ll be welcomed by the whole Alliance!If the cities between Alliance members are near, you can help each other more conveniently. I bet a banana that you’ll be welcomed by the whole Alliance!If the cities between Alliance members are near, you can help each other more conveniently. I bet a banana that you’ll be welcomed by the whole Alliance!If the cities between Alliance members are near, you can help each other more conveniently. I bet a banana that you’ll be welcomed by the whole Alliance!If the cities between Alliance members are near, you can help each other more conveniently. I bet a banana that you’ll be welcomed by the whole Alliance!If the cities between Alliance members are near, you can help each other more conveniently. I bet a banana that you’ll be welcomed by the whole Alliance!联盟【修改】成员的城市聚集在一起更方便你们互相帮助，你可以把城市传送到魁首附近，我打赌你的盟友们会开心地欢迎你！
141
101110014016_1_3看到这个能量了吗？这是你传送城市和开启防护罩所需要的能源。它会随时间恢复，或是使用相关道具来瞬间获取。Have you noticed the Energy Gauge? It’s required when you want to teleport your city or active the Shield. It will recover over time.Avez-vous remarqué la jauge d'énergie? L'énergie est nécessaire lorsque vous souhaitez téléporter votre ville ou activer le Bouclier. Elle se regénère avec le temps.Hast du die Energieanzeige bemerkt? Energie wird benötigt, wenn du deine Stadt teleportieren möchtest oder den Schild aktivieren möchtest. Sie stellt sich mit der Zeit wieder her.Você já reparou no Medidor de Energia? Ele é necessário para quando você desejar teleportar sua cidade ou ativar um Escudo. Ele será restaurado com o passar do tempo. Se não puder esperar, use os itens correspondentes para obter Energia imediatamente!看到這個能量了嗎？這是你傳送城市和開啟防護罩所需要的能源。它會隨時間恢復，或是使用相關道具來瞬間獲取。Have you noticed the Energy Gauge? It’s required when you want to teleport your city or active the Shield. It will recover over time.นายสังเกตเห็นแถบพลังงานไหม นายต้องใช้มาตรนี้เมื่อนายต้องการเทเลพอร์ตเมืองหรือเปิดใช้เกราะป้องกันของนาย ซึ่งแถบนี้จะฟื้นตัวเมื่อเวลาผ่านไป¿Viste el indicador de energía? Lo necesitarás cuando quieras teletransportar tu ciudad o activar un escudo. Se restaurará con el tiempo.Вы заметили датчик энергии? Он необходим, если вы хотите телепортировать свой город или активировать Щит. Он восстановится с течением времени. Если вы не можете дождаться этого, можете использовать соответствующие предметы, чтобы мгновенно восстановить энергию!Have you noticed the Energy Gauge? It’s required when you want to teleport your city or activate a Shield. It’ll restore as time passes. If you can’t wait for it, you can use corresponding items to get Energy immediately!Have you noticed the Energy Gauge? It’s required when you want to teleport your city or active the Shield. It will recover over time.Have you noticed the Energy Gauge? It’s required when you want to teleport your city or active the Shield. It will recover over time.Have you noticed the Energy Gauge? It’s required when you want to teleport your city or active the Shield. It will recover over time.Have you noticed the Energy Gauge? It’s required when you want to teleport your city or active the Shield. It will recover over time.Have you noticed the Energy Gauge? It’s required when you want to teleport your city or active the Shield. It will recover over time.Have you noticed the Energy Gauge? It’s required when you want to teleport your city or active the Shield. It will recover over time.看到这个能量了吗？这是你传送城市和开启防护罩所需要的能源。它会随时间恢复，或是使用相关道具来瞬间获取。

101110014116_1_4现在，你可以通过拖动城市或是滑动地图来改变要传送的地址，是不是很方便？Now, you can drag the city or slide the map to change your teleport destination. I guess it’s easy for you to handle it!Maintenant, vous pouvez déplacer votre ville ou faire glisser la carte pour choisir la destination de la téléportation.Du kannst die Stadt ziehen oder die Karte bewegen, um dein Teleportziel festzulegen. Eu acho que é fácil pra você resolver isso!現在，你可以通過拖動城市或是滑動地圖來改變要傳送的地址，是不是很方便？Now, you can drag the city or slide the map to change your teleport destination. Я полагаю, для вас это проще простого!Now, you can drag the city or slide the map to change your teleport destination. I guess it’s easy for you to handle!Now, you can drag the city or slide the map to change your teleport destination. I guess it’s easy for you to handle it!Now, you can drag the city or slide the map to change your teleport destination. 101110014216_1_5Oh,勤劳的猴子，你竟然还有部队在城外？Oh, you’re really a hard working primate! You have an army outside of the city?Oh, vous êtes vraiment un primate qui travaille dur! Avez-vous des troupes en dehors de la ville?Oh, du bist wirklich ein fleißiger Affe! Du hast eine Armee außerhalb der Stadt?Oh, você é realmente um primata que trabalha duro! Você ainda tem uma tropa fora da cidade?Oh,勤勞的猴子，你竟然還有部隊在城外？Oh, you’re really a hard working primate! You have an army outside of the city?โอ้ นายเป็นลิงที่ทำงานหนักจริง ๆ! นายมีกองทหารอยู่นอกเมืองอย่างนั้นหรือ¡Oh, eres un primate muy trabajador! ¿Aún tienes un ejército fuera de la ciudad?О, вы действительно трудолюбивый примат! У вас еще есть войска за пределами города?Oh, you’re really a hard working primate! You still have a troop outside of the city?Oh, you’re really a hard working primate! 101110014316_1_6原则上有部队在城外是不能迁城的，不过这次我偷偷给你个破例，不要告诉开发者哦~In principle, it’s not allowed to teleport the city. But I’ll close an eye on it for this time. But don’t tell anyone else behind all this!En principe, il n'est pas permis de téléporter la ville maintenant. Je vais fermer les yeux pour cette fois mais ne le dites à personne!Normalerweise kannst du die Stadt dann nicht teleportieren. Aber dieses eine Mal werde ich ein Auge zudrücken. Verrate es aber niemandem!A princípio, você não pode teleportar a cidade. Mas vou fazer vista grossa dessa vez. Mas não diga que mais alguém está por trás de tudo isso!原則上有部隊在城外是不能遷城的，不過這次我偷偷給你個破例，不要告訴開發者哦~In principle, it’s not allowed to teleport the city. But I’ll close an eye on it for this time. But don’t tell anyone else behind all this!ตามหลักการแล้ว กรณีนี้จะไม่สามารถเทเลพอร์ตได้ แต่เอาเป็นว่าฉันจะปิดตาข้างนึงก็แล้วกัน แต่ห้ามบอกใครเรื่องนี้ล่ะ!En principio, no está permitido teletransportar la ciudad. Pero por esta vez, me haré el ciego. ¡No se lo digas a nadie!В принципе, вы не можете телепортировать город. Но на этот раз я буду пристально следить за этим. Но не говорите, что за всем этим стоит кто-то еще!In principle, you can't teleport the city. But I’ll keep a close eye on it this time. 101110014416_1_7就是这样！我喜欢这个新地方！That’s it! This is just a primate place!Très bien, içi c'est parfait!Das ist er! Der perfekte Ort für Primaten wie uns!É isso aí! Este é apenas um lugar para primatas!就是這樣！我喜歡這個新地方！That’s it! This is just a primate place!เรียบร้อย! นี่แหละคือสถานที่ของเหล่าลิง!¡Eso es! ¡Este lugar es solo para primates!Вот и всё! 101110014516_1_8记住，合理利用能量来迁城和开盾，可以让你更灵活地战斗、防守和撤退。Remember, use Energy properly to teleport the city or activate the Shield. So you can handle fights swiftly and have more strategies to defend or retreat.N'oubliez pas, utilisez correctement l'énergie pour téléporter votre ville ou activer le bouclier.Denk daran, setze deine Energie richtig ein, um die Stadt zu teleportieren oder den Schild zu aktivieren. So kannst du Kämpfe effizient bewältigen und du hast mehr Strategien zur Verteidigung oder zum Rückzug.Lembre-se disso: você pode usar Energia apropriadamente para teleportar a cidade ou ativar um Escudo. Assim, você pode lidar com lutas rapidamente e ter ainda mais estratégias para defender ou recuar.記住，合理利用能量來遷城和開盾，可以讓你更靈活地戰鬥、防守和撤退。Remember, use Energy properly to teleport the city or activate the Shield. So you can handle fights swiftly and have more strategies to defend or retreat.จำไว้นะว่า ใช้พลังงานอย่างเหมาะสมเพื่อเทเลพอร์ตเมืองหรือเปิดเกราะป้องกัน นายจะได้สามารถรับมือกับการต่อสู้ได้อย่างรวดเร็ว และใช้กลยุทธ์ในการป้องกันหรือล่าถอยได้หลากหลายขึ้นRecuerda, puedes usar la energía para teletransportar la ciudad o activar el escudo. Así puedes manejar peleas rápidamente y tener aún más estrategias para defenderte o retirarte.Помните об этом и вы сможете правильно использовать энергию, чтобы телепортировать город или активировать щит. Так вы можете быстрее справиться с битвами и иметь еще больше стратегий для обороны или отступления.Remember this, you can properly use Energy to teleport the city or activate a Shield. So, you can handle fights swiftly and have even more strategies to defend or retreat.Remember, use Energy properly to teleport the city or activate the Shield. So you can handle fights swiftly and have more strategies to defend or retreat.Remember, use Energy properly to teleport the city or activate the Shield. So you can handle fights swiftly and have more strategies to defend or retreat.Remember, use Energy properly to teleport the city or activate the Shield. 101110015219_1_1看你越来越强大，我很欣慰。不过，虐可怜的小怪是不是已经让你感到没什么挑战性了呢？I’m glad to see you grow more powerful, buddy! But don’t you think you can do something more challenging than bully weak enemies?I’m glad to see you grow more powerful, buddy! But don’t you think you can do something more challenging than bully weak enemies?Es freut mich, wie mächtig du geworden bist, Kumpel! Denkst du aber nicht, dass du es langsam mit stärkeren Feinden aufnehmen kannst, statt immer nur die schwachen zu tyrannisieren?Fico feliz em vê-lo crescer mais poderoso, amigo! Mas você não acha que pode fazer algo mais desafiador do que intimidar inimigos fracos?看你越來越強大，我很欣慰。不過，虐可憐的小怪是不是已經讓你感到沒什麼挑戰性了呢？I’m glad to see you grow more powerful, buddy! But don’t you think you can do something more challenging than bully weak enemies?ฉันดีใจที่เห็นนายแข็งแกร่งขึ้นนะเพื่อน! แต่นายไม่คิดบ้างว่าคุณสามารถทำสิ่งที่ท้าทายได้มากกว่าการรังแกศัตรูที่อ่อนแอ¡Me alegra ver que aumentas tu poder, amigo! Pero ¿no crees que puedes hacer algo más desafiante que intimidar enemigos débiles?Я рад видеть, как ты становишься сильнее, приятель! Но не думаете ли вы, что можете сделать что-то большее, чем запугивать слабых врагов?I’m glad to see you grow more powerful, buddy! But don’t you think you can do something more challenging than bully weak enemies?I’m glad to see you grow more powerful, buddy! But don’t you think you can do something more challenging than bully weak enemies?I’m glad to see you grow more powerful, buddy! But don’t you think you can do something more challenging than bully weak enemies?I’m glad to see you grow more powerful, buddy! But don’t you think you can do something more challenging than bully weak enemies?I’m glad to see you grow more powerful, buddy! But don’t you think you can do something more challenging than bully weak enemies?I’m glad to see you grow more powerful, buddy! But don’t you think you can do something more challenging than bully weak enemies?I’m glad to see you grow more powerful, buddy! But don’t you think you can do something more challenging than bully weak enemies?看你越来越强大，我很欣慰。不过，虐可怜的小怪是不是已经让你感到没什么挑战性了呢？

101110015319_1_2别担心， 我们伟大而命短的人类朋友给我们留下的烂摊子可不少。是时候让你离开舒适区感受一下恐惧了，伙计。You get the point! Our great but short-lived human friends left a big mess for us to clear. I’ll kick you out of the safe zone and let you face the real terror, buddy.You get the point! Our great but short-lived human friends left a big mess for us to clear. I’ll kick you out of the safe zone and let you face the real terror, buddy.Du hast schon kapiert! Unsere großen, aber leider kurzlebigen Menschenfreunde haben uns eine große Sauerei hinterlassen, die wir beseitigen dürfen. Ich werfe dich jetzt aus der sicheren Zone, damit du den wahren Schrecken da draußen sehen kannst, Kumpel.Você entendeu! Nossos grandes e velhos amigos humanos deixaram uma grande bagunça para nós limparmos. Vou expulsá-lo da zona segura e deixá-lo enfrentar o verdadeiro terror, amigo.別擔心，我們偉大而命短的人類朋友給我們留下的爛攤子可不少。是時候讓你離開舒適區感受一下恐懼了，夥計。You get the point! Our great but short-lived human friends left a big mess for us to clear. I’ll kick you out of the safe zone and let you face the real terror, buddy.นายเข้าใจประเด็นสินะ! เพื่อนมนุษย์ผู้ยิ่งใหญ่แต่อายุขัยสั้นนักของเราทิ้งเรื่องยุ่งเหยิงเรื่องใหญ่เอาไว้ให้เราแก้ไข ฉันจะถีบนายออกไปจากพื้นที่ปลอดภัยตรงนี้เพื่อให้นายได้ลิ้มลองความหวาดกลัวที่แท้ทรูล่ะนะ เพื่อนเอย¡Tú entiendes! Nuestros grandes y efímeros amigos humanos nos dejaron un desastre. Te echaré de la zona segura y te dejaré enfrentar el verdadero terror, amigo.Вы поняли суть! Наши великие, но недолговечные друзья-люди оставили для нас большой бардак. Я выкину тебя из безопасной зоны и позволю тебе столкнуться с настоящим ужасом, приятель.You get the point! Our great but short-lived human friends left a big mess for us to clean up. I’ll kick you out of the safe zone and let you face the real terror, buddy.You get the point! Our great but short-lived human friends left a big mess for us to clear. I’ll kick you out of the safe zone and let you face the real terror, buddy.You get the point! Our great but short-lived human friends left a big mess for us to clear. I’ll kick you out of the safe zone and let you face the real terror, buddy.You get the point! Our great but short-lived human friends left a big mess for us to clear. I’ll kick you out of the safe zone and let you face the real terror, buddy.You get the point! Our great but short-lived human friends left a big mess for us to clear. I’ll kick you out of the safe zone and let you face the real terror, buddy.You get the point! Our great but short-lived human friends left a big mess for us to clear. I’ll kick you out of the safe zone and let you face the real terror, buddy.You get the point! Our great but short-lived human friends left a big mess for us to clear. I’ll kick you out of the safe zone and let you face the real terror, buddy.别担心， 我们伟大而命短的人类朋友给我们留下的烂摊子可不少。是时候让你离开舒适区感受一下恐惧了，伙计。
149
101110015419_1_3看到那个大家伙了吗？不要怀疑，你没做梦，那是因为辐射而变异的怪物。See that big guy? Don’t doubt what you’ve seen, you are right here, not in a dream. That’s a real monster mutated from radiation.See that big guy? Don’t doubt what you’ve seen, you are right here, not in a dream. That’s a real monster mutated from radiation.Siehst du den großen Kerl da? Trau deinen Augen, das ist kein Traum. Das ist ein echtes Monster, das durch Strahlung mutiert ist.Está vendo aquele grandalhão? Não duvide do que você viu. Você está realmente aqui, não em um sonho. Esse é um monstro real, modificado pela radiação.看到那個大傢伙了嗎？不要懷疑，你沒做夢，那是因為輻射而變異的怪物。See that big guy? Don’t doubt what you’ve seen, you are right here, not in a dream. That’s a real monster mutated from radiation.เห็นพ่อหนุ่มตัวเบิ้มนั่นไหม ไม่ต้องสงสัยหรอก ว่านายเห็นอะไร นายยืนอยู่ตรงนี้จริง ๆ ไม่ใช่ฝัน นั่นคือสัตว์ประหลาดจริงที่กลายพันธุ์เนื่องจากการแผ่รังสี¿Ves a ese grandullón? No dudes de lo que has visto. Estás aquí, no en un sueño. Ese es un verdadero monstruo mutado por la radiación.Видели этого большого парня? Не сомневайтесь в том, что вы видели. Вы действительно здесь, вы не спите. Это настоящий монстр, мутировавший от радиации.See that big guy? Don’t doubt what you’ve seen. You're really here, not in a dream. That’s a real monster mutated from radiation.See that big guy? Don’t doubt what you’ve seen, you are right here, not in a dream. That’s a real monster mutated from radiation.See that big guy? Don’t doubt what you’ve seen, you are right here, not in a dream. That’s a real monster mutated from radiation.See that big guy? Don’t doubt what you’ve seen, you are right here, not in a dream. That’s a real monster mutated from radiation.See that big guy? Don’t doubt what you’ve seen, you are right here, not in a dream. That’s a real monster mutated from radiation.See that big guy? Don’t doubt what you’ve seen, you are right here, not in a dream. That’s a real monster mutated from radiation.See that big guy? Don’t doubt what you’ve seen, you are right here, not in a dream. That’s a real monster mutated from radiation.看到那个大家伙了吗？不要怀疑，你没做梦，那是因为辐射而变异的怪物。
150
101110015519_1_4俗话说十指包拳力千斤。虽然我们大概只有它的脚拇指高，不过和盟友们团结起来，还是有与之一战的能力的。Humans once said, “Unity is strength.” We’re merely as high as its toes, but with the help of every Alliance member, we still have a chance to beat it!Humans once said, “Unity is strength.” We’re merely as high as its toes, but with the help of every Alliance member, we still have a chance to beat it!Die Menschen sagten immer „Gemeinsam sind wir stark“. Wir sind gerade mal so groß wie seine Zehen, aber mit allen Bündnismitgliedern können wir das Ding schlagen!Os humanos disseram uma vez: "A união faz a força". Somos apenas um incômodo, mas com a ajuda de todos os membros da Aliança, ainda temos uma chance de vencer!俗話說十指包拳力千斤。雖然我們大概只有它的腳拇指高，不過和盟友們團結起來，還是有與之一戰的能力的。Humans once said, “Unity is strength.” We’re merely as high as its toes, but with the help of every Alliance member, we still have a chance to beat it!มนุษย์เคยกล่าวไว้ว่า “ความสามัคคีคือพลัง” เราอาจสูงแค่นิ้วเท้าของพวกนั้น แต่ด้วยความช่วยเหลือจากสมาชิกพันธมิตรทุกคน เราย่อมมีโอกาสเอาชนะมันได้!Los seres humanos decían "la unidad hace la fuerza". No podemos compararnos con ellos, pero con la ayuda de todos los miembros de la alianza, ¡aún podemos vencerlo!Люди раньше говорили: «Единство - это сила». Мы всего лишь пустяк против него, но с помощью каждого участника Альянса у нас все еще есть шанс победить!Humans once said, “Unity is strength.” We’re merely a nuisance to it, but with the help of every Alliance member, we still have a chance to beat it!Humans once said, “Unity is strength.” We’re merely as high as its toes, but with the help of every Alliance member, we still have a chance to beat it!Humans once said, “Unity is strength.” We’re merely as high as its toes, but with the help of every Alliance member, we still have a chance to beat it!Humans once said, “Unity is strength.” We’re merely as high as its toes, but with the help of every Alliance member, we still have a chance to beat it!Humans once said, “Unity is strength.” We’re merely as high as its toes, but with the help of every Alliance member, we still have a chance to beat it!Humans once said, “Unity is strength.” We’re merely as high as its toes, but with the help of every Alliance member, we still have a chance to beat it!Humans once said, “Unity is strength.” We’re merely as high as its toes, but with the help of every Alliance member, we still have a chance to beat it!俗话说十指包拳力千斤。虽然我们大概只有它的脚拇指高，不过和盟友们团结起来，还是有与之一战的能力的。
151
101110015619_1_5上吧！不能用力量取胜，就用数量取胜！胜利就是正义！Let’s do it! If we can’t beat it with pure strength, we’ll do it by sheer force of numbers! Justice? Let’s talk about it after we have claimed the victory!Let’s do it! If we can’t beat it with pure strength, we’ll do it by sheer force of numbers! Justice? Let’s talk about it after we have claimed the victory!Los gehts! Wenn rohe Gewalt nicht ausreicht, besiegen wir das Ding durch Überzahl! Gerechtigkeit? Darüber reden wir, wenn wir den Sieg errungen haben!Vamos nessa! Se não conseguirmos derrotá-lo com força pura, faremos isso por pura força de números! Justiça? Vamos falar sobre isso depois que conseguimos a vitória!上吧！不能用力量取勝，就用數量取勝！勝利就是正義！Let’s do it! If we can’t beat it with pure strength, we’ll do it by sheer force of numbers! Justice? Let’s talk about it after we have claimed the victory!มาลุยกันเลย! ถ้าเราไม่สามารถเอาชนะได้ด้วยกำลังเพียว ๆ เราก็ต้องเล่นวิธีเอาจำนวนเข้าว่าล่ะนะ! ความยุติธรรมงั้นหรือ ไว้ค่อยมาคุยเรื่องนี้กันหลังจากเราชนะก็แล้วกัน!¡Lo haremos! Si no podemos vencerlo con fuerza bruta, venceremos simplemente porque somos más. ¿Justicia? ¡Hablemos de eso después de reclamar la victoria!Давайте сделаем это! Если мы не сможем победить силой, мы сделаем это с помощью силы чисел! Справедливость? Давайте поговорим об этом после того, как мы одержим победу!Let’s do it! If we can’t beat it with pure strength, we’ll do it by sheer force of numbers! Justice? Let’s talk about it after we've claimed victory!Let’s do it! If we can’t beat it with pure strength, we’ll do it by sheer force of numbers! Justice? Let’s talk about it after we have claimed the victory!Let’s do it! If we can’t beat it with pure strength, we’ll do it by sheer force of numbers! Justice? Let’s talk about it after we have claimed the victory!Let’s do it! If we can’t beat it with pure strength, we’ll do it by sheer force of numbers! Justice? Let’s talk about it after we have claimed the victory!Let’s do it! If we can’t beat it with pure strength, we’ll do it by sheer force of numbers! Justice? Let’s talk about it after we have claimed the victory!Let’s do it! If we can’t beat it with pure strength, we’ll do it by sheer force of numbers! Justice? Let’s talk about it after we have claimed the victory!Let’s do it! If we can’t beat it with pure strength, we’ll do it by sheer force of numbers! Justice? Let’s talk about it after we have claimed the victory!上吧！不能用力量取胜，就用数量取胜！胜利就是正义！

101110015820_1_2在你为氏族和联盟【修改】抛血洒汗后，得到的荣誉币（旁击带上荣誉币图标）可以在这里购买各种道具。After you’ve contributed everything to the Horde and Alliance, you can use the Honour Coins you have earned here to buy anything you want!After you’ve contributed everything to the Horde and Alliance, you can use the Honor Coins you have earned here to buy anything you want!Nachdem du Beiträge zu deiner Horde und dem Bündnis geleistet hast, kannst du hier verdiente Ehrenmünzen ausgeben und kaufen, was du willst!Depois de ter contribuído com tudo para a Horda e a Aliança, você pode usar as Moedas de Honra que ganhou para comprar o que quiser!在你為氏族和幫派拋血灑汗後，得到的榮譽幣（旁擊帶上榮譽幣圖示）可以在這裡購買各種道具。After you’ve contributed everything to the Horde and Alliance, you can use the Honour Coins you have earned here to buy anything you want!หลังจากที่นายสละทุกสิ่งทุกอย่างให้กับฝูงและพันธมิตรแล้ว นายสามารถใช้เหรียญเกียรติยศที่นายได้มาเพื่อซื้อทุกอย่างที่ต้องการได้ที่ร้านนี้!¡Después de haber contribuido todo a la horda y la alianza, podrás usar las Monedas de Honor que has ganado para comprar lo que quieras!После того, как вы вложили все в Орду и Альянс, вы можете использовать заработанные монеты чести, чтобы купить все, что захотите!After you’ve contributed everything to the Horde and Alliance, you can use the Honor Coins you've earned to buy anything you want!After you’ve contributed everything to the Horde and Alliance, you can use the Honour Coins you have earned here to buy anything you want!After you’ve contributed everything to the Horde and Alliance, you can use the Honour Coins you have earned here to 101110015920_1_3享受购物时光吧，猴子！Enjoy shopping time, buddy!Enjoy shopping time, buddy!Viel Spaß beim Shoppen, Kumpel!Aproveite as compras, amigo!享受購物時光吧，猴子！Enjoy shopping time, buddy!ช็อปให้เพลินนะเพื่อน!¡Disfruta las compras, amigo!Приятных покупок, приятель!Enjoy shopping, buddy!Enjoy shopping time, buddy!Enjoy shopping time, buddy!Enjoy shopping time, buddy!Enjoy shopping time, buddy!Enjoy shopping time, buddy!Enjoy shopping time, buddy!享受购物时光吧，猴子！
