101110016021_1_1嘿，你知道人类留下来的二氧化氮加速技术吗？我们的运输车上就有这个。试一下吧~Hey, you can boost your convoys, they have a turbo! Try it now!Hey, les convois ont un mode Turbo, pour aller beaucoup plus vite. Essayez!Hey, du kannst deine Konvois beschleunigen! Sie haben einen Turbo eingebaut, probiere es aus!Ei, você pode impulsionar seus comboios, eles têm turbo! Experimente agora!唏，你的車隊有渦輪增壓器，你可以幫它們加速的！馬上試試吧！Hey, kamu bisa mempercepat konvoi, mereka memiliki turbo! Coba sekarang!เฮ้ นายสามารถเร่งความเร็วรถคอนวอยของนายได้นะ รถนั่นมีเทอร์โบ! ไปลองดูเลย!Oye, ¡puedes potenciar tus escoltas, tienen turbo! ¡Pruébalo ahora!При помощи турбо-ускорения вы можете ускорить свои караваны! Попробуйте прямо сейчас.Hey, konvoylarını hızlandırabilirsin çünkü bir turboları var! Hemen dene!Này, bạn có thể tăng tốc cho xe chuyên chở đấy, họ có bộ phận gia tốc mà! Hãy thử ngay!Ehi, puoi potenziare i tuoi convogli! Hanno la funzione turbo! Provala subito!Hej, możesz przyspieszyć swoje Konwoje, one mają turbo! Spróbuj teraz!مهلا، يمكنك تعزيز قوافلك، فلديهم توربو! جربه الآن!君は人間たちが遺していった、二酸化窒素加速技術を知ってるか？僕たちの輸送車にも搭載されてるんだ。ほら、試してみなよ！인류가 남긴 이산화질소 가속 기술에 대해 아세요? 우리 수송차에 적용되어 있는데, 한번 써 보세요~嘿，你知道人类留下来的二氧化氮加速技术吗？我们的运输车上就有这个。试一下吧~
156
101110016121_2_1这么快的速度，用来摆脱追击最好不过了，特别是摆脱路上的白猴子。It’s also useful to escape from Mutants, as they can attack convoys!Ca sert, entre autres, à échapper aux mutants qui attaquent les convois.So kannst du auch vor Mutanten entkommen. Die können nämlich Konvois angreifen!Também é útil para escapar de símios mutantes, já que eles atacam comboios!這樣還能避開襲擊車隊的變種猴子！Tindakan ini juga berguna untuk melarikan diri dari Kera Mutan, karena mereka bisa menyerang konvoi!เทอร์โบยังใช้เพื่อการหลบหนีเจ้าจ๋อมิวแตนด์ได้ด้วยนะ เพราะเจ้าพวกนั้นมันสามารถโจมตีรถคอนวอยได้!¡También es útil para escapar de los Monos Mutantes, pues ellos pueden atacar escoltas!И к тому же это помогает сбежать от обезьян-мутантов, которые могут напасть на ваш караван!Konvoylara saldıran Mutant Maymunlardan kaçmak için de faydalı!Tính năng này cũng rất hữu dụng trong việc chạy thoát khỏi lũ Khỉ Đột Biến do chúng có khả năng tấn công xe chuyên chở!È anche utile per scappare dai Mutanti, perché possono attaccare i convogli!Przydaje się to również do ucieczki przed Mutantami, gdyż mogą one atakować Konwoje!من المفيد أيضًا الهروب من المسوخ، حيث يمكنهم مهاجمة القوافل!凄まじいスピードだな！追撃をまくにはもってこいだ。特に、あの白い猿どもの。이렇게 빠른 속도는 추격에서 벗어날 때 사용하기 좋습니다. 특히 길 위의 흰 원숭이로부터 벗어날 때 아주 유용하죠.这么快的速度，用来摆脱追击最好不过了，特别是摆脱路上的白猴子。
157
101110016221_2_2一次加速可以持续1分钟，然后就需要再次启动。所以，不要忘了你的车和货物。The turbo lasts 60 sec, and recharges quickly. So take a look at your convoys often!Le turbo dure 1mn, et se recharge vite. Suivez vos convois jusqu'à leur destination!Der Turbo hält 60 Sekunden und lädt sich schnell wieder auf. Wirf also öfters einen Blick auf deine Konvois!O turbo dura 60 segundos e recarrega rápido. Então fique de olho nos seus comboios!渦輪增壓器可持續60秒，重置也很快。所以要多留意你的車隊！Turbo berlangsung selama 60 detik, dan akan terisi ulang dengan cepat. Jadi sering-seringlah memperhatikan konvoimu!โดยเทอร์โบจะใช้งานได้นาน 60 วินาทีและชาร์จใหม่ได้อย่างรวดเร็ว ดังนั้น หมั่นตรวจดูรถคอนวอยของนายบ่อย ๆ นะ!El turbo dura 60 segundos y se recarga rápidamente. ¡Revisa tus escoltas a menudo!Турбо-ускорение действует 60 секунд и быстро перезаряжается. Так что почаще смотрите на свои караваны!Turbo 60 saniye sürüyor ve hızla yeniden doluyor. Bu yüzden sık sık konvoylarına göz atmalısın!Gia tốc sẽ kéo dài 60 giây và nhanh chóng được nạp lại. Do đó, hãy thường xuyên để mắt đến các đoàn xe chuyên chở nhé!Il turbo dura 60 sec e si ricarica rapidamente. Quindi dai spesso un'occhiata ai convogli!Turbo trwa 60 sekund, a ładuje się szybko. Dlatego często zaglądaj do swoich Konwojów!يدوم التوربو 60 ثانية، ويعاد شحنه بسرعة. لذا ألقي نظرة على قوافلك في كثير من الأحيان!一回の加速は1分間持続する。それが終わったら、もう一回起動するんだ。僕たちの車と貨物を忘れるなよ？1회 가속 시 1분 동안 지속되며, 그 후에는 다시 가속해야 합니다. 그러니 당신의 차와 화물을 잊지 마세요.一次加速可以持续1分钟，然后就需要再次启动。所以，不要忘了你的车和货物。
158

1011100165v11_1_1_3啊！又有一名感受到科学魅力的年轻人加入<color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color>，非常欢迎你！Ah, welcome! With the <color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color> you will experience the full charm of science!Oh, bienvenue! Avec les <color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color>, vous allez témoigner de nos prouesses scientifiques!Ah, willkommen! Com <color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color>, você pode experimentar todo o charme da ciência!啊，歡迎回來！有了<color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color>，你就可以全面感受科學的魅力了！Ah, selamat datang! Dengan <color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color>, kamu akan menikmati keunggulan sains sepenuhnya!อ๊ะ ยินดีต้อนรับ! ด้วย<color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color>คุณจะได้สัมผัสกับเสน่ห์ของวิทยาศาสตร์อย่างเต็มรูปแบบแน่นอน!¡Oh, bienvenido! Aquí con los <color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color> podrás experimentar todos los encantos de la ciencia.А, добро пожаловать! <color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color> — это все очарование науки в твоем распоряжении!Oh, hoş geldin! <color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color> ile bilimin tüm çekiciliğinin tadına bakacaksın!Vâng, chào mừng đồng chí! Cùng với <color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color>, bạn sẽ trải nghiệm được toàn bộ nét quyến rũ của khoa học!Ah, welcome! With the <color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color> you will experience the full charm of science!Ah, welcome! With the <color=#0a5cb8>{0}</color> you will experience the full charm of science!Ah, welcome! 1011100166v11_1_1_4<color=#BC65FF>{0}</color>拥有许多关于生存的哲学，我想你不会失望的。Salutations, young one. The <color=#BC65FF>{0}</color> will teach you the philosophy of surviving. You will achieve great things here.Salutation, jeune singe. Les <color=#BC65FF>{0}</color> vous transmettront l'art de la survie. Ici, vous accomplirez des exploits!Sei gegrüßt, junges Äffchen. Die <color=#BC65FF>{0}</color> wird dich die Philosophie des Überlebens lehren. Du wirst hier große Dinge erreichen.Saudações, jovem. Com <color=#BC65FF>{0}</color> você vai aprender a filosofia da sobrevivência. Você vai chegar longe aqui.你好，年輕的猴子。<color=#BC65FF>{0}</color> 會教曉你生存的哲學。你將會在這裡獲益良多。Salam, anak muda. <color=#BC65FF>{0}</color> akan mengajarimu tentang falsafah untuk bertahan hidup. Kamu akan meraih prestasi cemerlang di sini.ขอทักทาย เจ้าหนุ่ม <color=#BC65FF>{0}</color>จะสอนคุณถึงปรัชญาการเอาชีวิตรอด คุณจะประสบความสำเร็จดีเยี่ยมที่นี่Saludos, jovencito. Los <color=#BC65FF>{0}</color> te enseñaran la filosofía de la sobrevivencia. Alcanzaras grandes cosas aquí.Привет, юный примат. <color=#BC65FF>{0}</color> научат тебя философии выживания. Здесь ты достигнешь великих высот.Selamlar genç maymun. <color=#BC65FF>{0}</color> sana hayatta kalma felsefesini öğretecek. Burada harika şeyler başaracaksın.Chào chú khỉ trẻ. <color=#BC65FF>{0}</color> sẽ giúp bạn hiểu hơn về triết lý sống còn. Ở đây bạn sẽ đạt được nhiều điều tuyệt vời.Salutations, young one. The <color=#BC65FF>{0}</color> will teach you the philosophy of surviving. You will achieve great things here.Salutations, young one. The <color=#BC65FF>{0}</color> will teach you the philosophy of surviving. You will achieve great things here.Salutations, young one. 1011100167v11_1_1_5你做的很好，欢迎加入<color=#0bca6f>{0}</color>，你有的是时间领悟爆炸的美妙！Good choice monkey, welcome to the <color=#0bca6f>{0}</color>. With us, you will become an expert blowing things up!Excellent choix, primate! Bienvenue chez les <color=#0bca6f>{0}</color>. Nous allons faire de vous un vrai spécialiste des explosions !Gut gewählt, Affe, willkommen bei der <color=#0bca6f>{0}</color>. Bei uns lernst du alles über Explosionen!Bela escolha, macaco, boas-vindas a <color=#0bca6f>{0}</color>. Conosco, você aprenderá tudo sobre explosões!英明的決定，歡迎加入<color=#0bca6f>{0}</color>。我們會教你一切與爆炸有關的知識！Pilihan bagus kera, selamat datang di <color=#0bca6f>{0}</color>. Bersama kami, kamu akan menjadi ahli peledak!เลือกได้ดีนี่เจ้าจ๋อ ยินดีต้อนรับเข้าสู่<color=#0bca6f>{0}</color> ทำงานรว่มกับเรา คุณจะกลายเป็นผู้เชี่ยวชาญที่น่าทึ่ง!Buena elección mono, bienvenido al <color=#0bca6f>{0}</color>. ¡Con nosotros, aprenderás todo lo que hay que saber acerca de las explosiones!Хороший выбор, обезьяна. <color=#0bca6f>{0}</color> приветствуют тебя. Мы научим тебя всему, что нужно знать о взрывах!İyi seçim maymun, <color=#0bca6f>{0}</color> bünyesine hoş geldin. Bizimleyken patlamalara dair her şeyi öğreneceksin!Lựa chọn tốt đấy đồng chí, chào mừng đến với <color=#0bca6f>{0}</color>. Đến với chúng tôi, bạn sẽ trở thành một chuyên gia trong việc thổi tung tất cả!Good choice monkey, welcome to the <color=#0bca6f>{0}</color>. With us, you will become an expert blowing things up!Good choice monkey, welcome to the <color=#0bca6f>{0}</color>. 1011100168v11_1_2_1今天可是个大日子，我们的火箭就要飞向太空了！Today is a great moment for us. We are going to launch a Rocket into space!C'est un grand jour pour nous. Nous nous apprêtons à lancer une fusée dans l'espace!Heute ist ein großer Tag für uns. Wir werden eine Rakete ins All starten!Este é um grande momento para nós. Vamos lançar um foguete no espaço!今天是我們的重要時刻。我們即將要發射火箭上太空！Hari ini adalah momen terbaik bagi kita, karena kita akan meluncurkan Roket ke luar angkasa!วันนี้คือช่วงเวลาที่ดีที่สุดของเรา เราจะทำการปล่อยจรวดขึ้นสู่อวกาศ!Hoy es un gran día para nosotros. ¡Vamos a lanzar un Cohete al espacio!Вот и настал этот великий день! Сегодня мы запускаем ракету в космос!Bugün bizim için harika bir an. Uzaya bir Roket fırlatacağız!Hôm nay là một ngày tuyệt vời đối với chúng ta. Chúng ta sẽ phóng một Hỏa Tiễn vào không gian!Today is a great moment for us. We are going to launch a Rocket into space!Today is a great moment for us. We are going to launch a Rocket into space!Today is a great moment for us. We are going to launch a Rocket into space!Today is a great moment for us. We are going to launch a Rocket into space!Today is a great moment for us. We are going to launch a Rocket into space!今天可是个大日子，我们的火箭就要飞向太空了！
164
1011100169v11_1_2_2就在今天，我们的火箭终于要发射了！You arrived at the right moment monkey. We are finally launching a Rocket!Vous tombez bien: nous sommes sur le point de faire décoller la fusée!Du bist genau zum richtigen Zeitpunkt eingetroffen, Affe. Wir starten jetzt endlich eine Rakete!Você chegou na hora certa, macaco. Finalmente vamos lançar um foguete!你來得正好，猴子。我們終於要發射火箭了！Kamu tiba di waktu yang tepat, kera. Akhirnya kita akan meluncurkan Roket!คุณมาตอนช่วงเวลาที่เหมาะพอดีเลยเจ้าจ๋อ ในที่สุดเราก็ได้ปล่อยจรวดแล้ว!¡Llegaste en el momento justo, mono! Finalmente estamos lanzando un cohete.Ты прибыл в нужный момент, примат. Мы наконец-то запускаем ракету!Doğru zamanda geldin maymun. Nihayet bir Roket fırlatıyoruz!Bạn đến đúng lúc đó, đồng chí khỉ. Chúng ta cuối cùng cũng phóng được một Hỏa Tiễn!You arrived at the right moment monkey. We are finally launching a Rocket!You arrived at the right moment monkey. We are finally launching a Rocket!You arrived at the right moment monkey. We are finally launching a Rocket!You arrived at the right moment monkey. We are finally launching a Rocket!You arrived at the right moment monkey. We are finally launching a Rocket!就在今天，我们的火箭终于要发射了！
165
1011100170v11_1_2_3科学的探索永无止境！让我们从这次火箭发射开始吧！Scientific discoveries never stop. Launching this Rocket will bring us new knowledge!La recherche scientifique n'a pas de limite. Le lancement de cette fusée va répondre à de nombreuses questions!Wissenschaftliche Entdeckungen nehmen nie ein Ende. Der Start dieser Rakete wird uns neue Erkenntnisse bringen!As descobertas científicas não param. Lançar este foguete nos trará novos conhecimentos!科學的發現永不止息。發射火箭會為我們帶來新的知識！Penemuan ilmiah tidak pernah berhenti. Peluncuran Roket ini akan menghadirkan pengetahuan baru!การค้นพบทางวิทยาศาสตร์ไม่เคยหยุดนิ่ง ปล่อยจรวดลำนี้เพื่อนำข่าวเกี่ยวกับความรู้มาให้แก่เรา!Los descubrimientos científicos nunca terminan. ¡Lanzar este cohete nos traerá nuevo conocimiento!Научные открытия никогда не прекращаются. Запуск этой ракеты принесет нам новые знания!Bilimsel keşifler hiçbir zaman durmaz. Bu Roketi fırlatmak bize yeni bilgiler getirecek!Những khám phá khoa học không bao giờ dừng lại. Việc phóng Hỏa Tiễn này sẽ mang lại cho chúng ta nhiều kiến ​​thức mới!Scientific discoveries never stop. Launching this Rocket will bring us new knowledge!Scientific discoveries never stop. Launching this Rocket will bring us new knowledge!Scientific discoveries never stop. Launching this Rocket will bring us new knowledge!Scientific discoveries never stop. Launching this Rocket will bring us new knowledge!Scientific discoveries never stop. Launching this Rocket will bring us new knowledge!科学的探索永无止境！让我们从这次火箭发射开始吧！
166
1011100171v11_1_2_4适当的竞争有助于保持氏族的团结，正是靠着团结我们得以发射火箭。Team work helps us launch Rockets, and dominate all the other monkeys!Grâce au travail d'équipe, nous arriverons à lancer des fusées et asseoir notre domination!Teamarbeit hilft uns, die anderen Affen zu dominieren und Raketen zu starten!O trabalho em equipe nos ajuda a dominar os outros macacos e a lançar foguetes!團隊合作可以幫助我們稱霸猴界，發射火箭！Kerja sama tim membantu kita meluncurkan Roket, dan mendominasi semua kera lainnya!การทำงานเป็นทีมช่วยให้เราปล่อยจรวดไปได้ และเข้าปกครองเจ้าจ๋อตัวอื่น ๆ ทุกตัว!¡El trabajo en equipo nos permite dominar a los otros monos y lanzar Cohetes!Командная работа помогает нам брать верх над другими обезьянами и запускать ракеты!Ekip çalışması diğer maymunlara hükmetmemizi ve Roketler fırlatmamızı sağlayacak!Tinh thần làm việc nhóm giúp chúng ta phóng thành công nhiều Hỏa Tiễn và thống trị tất cả những chú khỉ khác!Team work helps us launch Rockets, and dominate all the other monkeys!Team work helps us launch Rockets, and dominate all the other monkeys!Team work helps us launch Rockets, and dominate all the other monkeys!Team work helps us launch Rockets, and dominate all the other monkeys!Team work helps us launch Rockets, and dominate all the other monkeys!适当的竞争有助于保持氏族的团结，正是靠着团结我们得以发射火箭。
167
1011100172v11_1_2_5现在就把这座火箭给我射向太空！Launch the Rocket into space now!Lancez la fusée maintenant!Schieße die Rakete jetzt ins All!Lance o foguete no espaço agora!馬上把火箭發射上太空！Luncurkan Roket ke luar angkasa sekarang juga!ปล่อยจรวดขึ้นสู่อวกาศตอนนี้เลย!¡Lanza el Cohete al espacio ahora!Нужно скорее запустить ракету в космос!Roketi uzaya şimdi fırlat!Phóng Hỏa Tiễn vào không gian ngay thôi!Launch the Rocket into space now!Launch the Rocket into space now!Launch the Rocket into space now!Launch the Rocket into space now!Launch the Rocket into space now!现在就把这座火箭给我射向太空！
168
1011100173v11_1_3_1只要能找回金币【修改】，我们就是最酷的氏族！All the other monkeys know that we are the strongest, and more importantly, the coolest ones around here!Tous les primates savent que nous sommes les plus puissants, mais surtout les plus cools!All die anderen Affen wissen, dass wir die Stärksten und vor allem die Coolsten hier sind.Todos os outros macacos sabem que somos os mais fortes e, mais importante, os mais legais por aqui.讓其他的猴子知道我們才是最強、最帥的猴子！Semua kera lainnya tahu bahwa kita adalah yang terkuat, dan yang lebih penting, yang terkeren di sekitar sini!เจ้าจ๋อทุกตัวรู้ว่าเราแข็งแกร่งที่สุด และสำคัญมากที่สุด เจ๋งที่สุดในย่านนี้!Todos los otros monos saben que nosotros somos los más fuertes, pero más importante, que somos los más guapos por aquí.Остальные обезьяны знают, что мы сильнейшие, а главное — крутейшие в этих краях.Diğer tüm maymunlar bizim en güçlü olduğumuzu ve daha da önemlisi buraların en havalıları olduğumuzu biliyorlar.Tất cả những chú khỉ khác đều biết rằng chúng ta là những thành phần mạnh nhất, và quan trọng hơn là tuyệt vời nhất nơi đây!All the other monkeys know that we are the strongest, and more importantly, the coolest ones around here!All the other monkeys know that we are the strongest, and more importantly, the coolest ones around here!All the other monkeys know that we are the strongest, and more importantly, the coolest ones around here!All the other monkeys know that we are the strongest, and more importantly, the coolest ones around here!All the other monkeys know that we are the strongest, and more importantly, the coolest ones around here!只要能找回金币【修改】，我们就是最酷的氏族！
169
1011100174v11_1_3_2你很幸运，刚加入氏族就能见证火箭发射的伟大的时刻！As a new member, you are very lucky to witness the greatest moment of our Clan. The launch of our Rocket!En tant que nouveau membre, vous avez le privilège d'assister à un évènement majeur pour notre clan: le décollage de la fusée!Als neues Mitglied hast du das Glück, Zeuge des größten Moments unserer Horde zu werden. Dem Start unserer Rakete!Como novo membro, você tem muita sorte de testemunhar o momento de glória do nosso clã. O lançamento do nosso foguete!作為氏族的新成員，你有幸見證我們氏族的偉大時刻！火箭發射的瞬間！Sebagai anggota baru, kamu sangat beruntung bisa menyaksikan momen terbaik Klan kita. Peluncuran Rocket kita!ในฐานะที่เป็นสมาชิกใหม่ คุณโชคดีมากที่ได้เห็นช่วงเวลาที่ยิ่งใหญ่ที่สุดของเผ่าเรา การปล่อยจรวดของเรายังไงล่ะ!Como nuevo miembro, tienes suerte de ser testigo de uno de los más grandes momentos de nuestro Clan. ¡El lanzamiento de nuestro cohete!Тебе очень повезло, что ты присоединяешься к клану в момент его величайшего триумфа — запуска ракеты!Yeni bir üye olarak, Klanımızın en önemli anına tanıklık ettiğin için çok şanslısın. Roketimizin fırlatılışı!Là một thành viên mới, bạn thật sự may mắn khi được chứng kiến ​​khoảnh khắc trọng đại nhất của Bộ Lạc chúng ta. Đó chính là sự kiện phóng Hỏa Tiễn!As a new member, you are very lucky to witness the greatest moment of our Clan. The launch of our Rocket!As a new member, you are very lucky to witness the greatest moment of our Clan. The launch of our Rocket!As a new member, you are very lucky to witness the greatest moment of our Clan. The launch of our Rocket!As a new member, you are very lucky to witness the greatest moment of our Clan. The launch of our Rocket!As a new member, you are very lucky to witness the greatest moment of our Clan. The launch of our Rocket!你很幸运，刚加入氏族就能见证火箭发射的伟大的时刻！
170
1011100175v11_1_3_3当然，如果能在太空中找到金币【修改】，氏族成员一定会很开心。Also, if you help us get that banana in the sky, all the monkeys on this Earth will adore you!D'ailleurs, si vous parvenez à atteindre cette banane géante, vous serez le plus aimé des singes!Wenn du uns hilfst, diese Banane in den Himmel zu bekommen, werden dich alle Affen auf diesem Planeten anbeten!Além disso, se nos ajudar a conquistar a banana que está no céu, todos os macacos na Terra vão idolatrar você!還有，如果你幫我們摘得天上的金币【修改】，地球上所有的猴子都會打從心底地敬愛你！Lagi pula, kalau kamu membantu kami mendapatkan pisang itu di langit, semua kera di Bumi ini akan memujamu!ดังนั้น หากคุณช่วยพวกเราเก็บกล้วยที่บนฟ้านั่นมา พวกจ๋อทั้งหลายบนโลกนี้จะต้องรักคุณแน่ๆ!Además, si nos ayudas a obtener la banana en el cielo, ¡todos los monos de esta Tierra te adoraran!А если ты поможешь нам достать банан с неба, то все обезьяны на земле будут тебя боготворить!Ayrıca, gökteki o muza ulaşmamıza yardım edersen Dünya’daki tüm maymunlar sana hayranlık duyacak!Đồng thời, nếu bạn giúp chúng tôi lấy quả chuối đó từ trên trời, tất cả khỉ trên Trái Đất này sẽ yêu quý bạn đấy!Also, if you help us get that banana in the sky, all the monkeys on this Earth will adore you!Also, if you help us get that banana in the sky, all the monkeys on this Earth will adore you!Also, if you help us get that banana in the sky, all the monkeys on this Earth will adore you!Also, if you help us get that banana in the sky, all the monkeys on this Earth will adore you!Also, if you help us get that banana in the sky, all the monkeys on this Earth will adore you!当然，如果能在太空中找到金币【修改】，氏族成员一定会很开心。
171
1011100176v11_1_3_4接下来，陪我一起安静的欣赏绚烂的火箭发射吧！Now, let's enjoy the beautiful launch of our Rocket!Maintenant, installons-nous pour admirer le décollage de notre superbe fusée!Lass uns jetzt den wunderschönen Start unserer Rakete genießen!Agora, vamos curtir o lançamento do nosso belo foguete!現在來欣賞火箭發射的美景吧！Sekarang, mari nikmati peluncuran indah Roket kita!ตอนนี้เรามาสนุกกับการปล่อยจรวดของเรากันเถอะ!¡Ahora, disfrutemos del hermoso lanzamiento de nuestro Cohete!А теперь давай насладимся чудесным зрелищем запуска нашей ракеты!Şimdi Roketimizin harika fırlatılışının keyfini çıkaralım!Giờ đây, hãy cùng thưởng thức màn phóng Hỏa Tiễn tuyệt đẹp!Now, let's enjoy the beautiful launch of our Rocket!Now, let's enjoy the beautiful launch of our Rocket!Now, let's enjoy the beautiful launch of our Rocket!Now, let's enjoy the beautiful launch of our Rocket!Now, let's enjoy the beautiful launch of our Rocket!接下来，陪我一起安静的欣赏绚烂的火箭发射吧！
172
1011100177v11_1_3_5我要让所有氏族都看看，疯狂才能得第一！I'll make sure the other Clans know what a mad monkey you are!Je veillerai à ce que les autres clans sachent combien votre folie est grande!Ich werde dafür sorgen, dass die anderen Horden wissen, was du für ein wilder Affe bist!Os outros clãs vão ficar sabendo que tipo de macaco louco você é!讓其他氏族見識一下你是多麼瘋狂的一隻猴子！Saya akan memastikan Klan lain tahu betapa geniusnya dirimu!ฉันจะทำให้แน่ใจว่าเผ่าอื่น ๆ รู้ว่าคุณคือเจ้าจ๋อสุดคลั่งแค่ไหน!¡Me encargaré que los otros Clanes sepan la clase de mono loco que eres!Я позабочусь о том, чтобы все кланы узнали, какой ты выдающийся примат!Diğer Klanların senin ne kadar çılgın bir maymun olduğunu bilmesini sağlayacağım!Tôi sẽ cho các Bộ Lạc khác biết rằng bạn là một chú khỉ điên rồ!I'll make sure the other Clans know what a mad monkey you are!I'll make sure the other Clans know what a mad monkey you are!I'll make sure the other Clans know what a mad monkey you are!I'll make sure the other Clans know what a mad monkey you are!I'll make sure the other Clans know what a mad monkey you are!我要让所有氏族都看看，疯狂才能得第一！
173

We need more <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> for our Rocket!There's an emergency! We need more <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> for our Rocket!There's an emergency! We need more <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> for our Rocket!There's an emergency! We need more <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> for our Rocket!There's an emergency! 1011100179v11_3_1_1但我们没有时间了！罗杰，让所有人都出去找<color=#ffaa00>货运枢纽【修改】</color>！要快！Time is running out! Roger, inform every monkey out there to find <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>! Hurry up!Le temps presse! Роджер, сообщи всем обезьянам: нужно срочно искать <color=#ffaa00>уран</color>! Быстрее!Zaman azalıyor! Roger, tüm maymunlara <color=#ffaa00>Uranyum</color> bulmaları gerektiğini söyle! Acele et!Thời gian không còn nhiều! Roger, hãy thông báo cho tất cả khỉ ra ngoài tìm <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>! Nhanh!Time is running out! Yeterince toplarsak, onu Roketimizi uzaya fırlatmak için kullanabiliriz ve böylece zafere ulaşırız.<color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> rất quan trọng với chúng ta! Nếu thu thập đủ, chúng ta có thể sử dụng nó để phóng Hỏa Tiễn vào vũ trụ, và chiến thắng sẽ thuộc về chúng ta.<color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> is vital for us! wirst du Assistenten brauchen, die dir helfen, das <color=#ffaa00>Uran</color> da draußen zu finden.Tenho certeza que você é um macaco inteligente, mas vai precisar de assistentes para encontrar <color=#ffaa00>urânio</color> por aí mesmo assim.你是一隻聰明的猴子，但你需要一些助手，協助你在外面尋找<color=#ffaa00>鈾料</color>。Saya yakin kamu kera cerdas, tapi kamu masih butuh asisten untuk membantumu menemukan <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> di luar sana.ฉันแน่ใจแล้วว่าคุณคือเจ้าจ๋อที่ฉลากหลักแหลม แต่ยังไงซะคุณก็จะต้องการผู้ช่วยในการช่วยคุณหา<color=#ffaa00>ยูเรเนียม</color>จากข้างนอกนั่นอยู่ดีนั่นแหล่ะEstoy seguro de que eres un mono inteligente, pero necesitarás de asistentes para ayudarte a encontrar el <color=#ffaa00>Uranio</color> allá afuera.Не сомневаюсь, что ты умный примат, но для поиска <color=#ffaa00>урана</color> тебе понадобятся помощники.Zeki bir maymun olduğuna eminim, ancak orada <color=#ffaa00>Uranyum</color> bulabilmen için yine de yardımcılara ihtiyacın olacak.Ta biết ngươi là một chú khỉ thông minh, nhưng dù gì đi nữa ngươi vẫn cần vài người hỗ trợ tìm <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> ngoài kia.I'm sure you are an intelligent monkey, but you'll need assistants to help you find <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> out there.I'm sure you are an intelligent monkey, but you'll need assistants to help you find <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> out there.I'm sure you are an intelligent monkey, but you'll need assistants to help you find <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> out there.I'm sure you are an intelligent monkey, but you'll need assistants to help you find <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> out there.I'm sure you are an intelligent monkey, but you'll need assistants to help you find <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> out there.对了，别忘了给这位勇士也分配些人手去寻找<color=#ffaa00>钛矿</color>，他是个好苗子！
182
1011100187v11_3_2_4对了，给这位勇士也分配一些人手去寻找<color=#ffaa00>货运枢纽【修改】</color>，我们应该多给年轻猴机会。I know you are a monkey with class, that's why you'll need some assistants to do the dirty work for you finding <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.Un singe distingué tel que vous a besoin d'un assistant pour les sales besognes comme la recherche <color=#ffaa00>d'uranium</color>.Ich weiß, du bist ein Affe mit Klasse, deshalb wirst du einige Assistenten brauchen, die dir bei der schmutzigen Arbeit helfen, <color=#ffaa00>Uran</color> zu finden.Sei que você é um macaco de classe, e é por isso que vai precisar de assistentes para fazer o trabalho sujo para encontrar <color=#ffaa00>urânio</color>.你是一隻有品位的猴子，所以在尋找<color=#ffaa00>鈾料</color>的過程中，你將會需要一些助手幫你處理苦差。Saya tahu kamu kera berkelas, itulah alasan kamu butuh asisten untuk melakukan tugas licik saat mencari <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.ฉันรู้ว่าคุณคือเจ้าจ๋อที่มีคลาส และนั่นก็คือเหตุผลที่ว่าคุณจะต้องการผู้ช่วยในการทำงานสกปรกนี้เพื่อหา<color=#ffaa00>ยูเรเนียม</color>Se que eres un mono con clase, es por eso que necesitaras de algunos asistentes para hacer el trabajo sucio de ayudarte a encontrar el <color=#ffaa00>Uranio</color>..В тебе виден класс. Поэтому для грязной работы по поиску <color=#ffaa00>урана</color> тебе понадобятся помощники.Klas sahibi bir maymun olduğunu biliyorum, bu yüzden <color=#ffaa00>Uranyum</color> bulma konusunda pis işleri yapmak için yardımcılara ihtiyacın olacak.Ta biết ngươi là một chú khỉ ưu tú, vì thế ngươi sẽ cần vài người hỗ trợ tìm <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.I know you are a monkey with class, that's why you'll need some assistants to do the dirty work for you finding <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.I know you are a monkey with class, that's why you'll need some assistants to do the dirty work for you finding <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.I know you are a monkey with class, that's why you'll need some assistants to do the dirty work for you finding <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.I know you are a monkey with class, that's why you'll need some assistants to do the dirty work for you finding <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.I know you are a monkey with class, that's why you'll need some assistants to do the dirty work for you finding <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.对了，给这位勇士也分配一些人手去寻找<color=#ffaa00>钛矿</color>，我们应该多给年轻猴机会。
183
1011100188v11_3_2_5对了，给这位勇士也分配一些人手去寻找<color=#ffaa00>货运枢纽【修改】</color>，我喜欢这家伙。You will need some assistants to help you carry all your bombs while you look for <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.Vous allez avoir besoin d'assistants pour vous aider à transporter ces bombes pendant que vous cherchez de <color=#ffaa00>l'uranium</color>.Du wirst ein paar Assistenten brauchen, die dir helfen, all deine Bomben zu tragen, während du nach <color=#ffaa00>Uran</color> suchst.Você vai precisar de alguns assistentes para carregar todas as suas bombas enquanto procura <color=#ffaa00>urânio</color>.你去尋找<color=#ffaa00>鈾料</color>的時候，需要一些助手幫你背著這些炸彈。Kamu akan butuh asisten untuk membantumu membawa semua bom saat mencari <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.คุณจะต้องการผู้ช่วยมาช่วยแบกระเบิดทั้งหมดนี้ของคุณในระหว่างที่คุณกำลังมองหา<color=#ffaa00>ยูเรเนียม</color>อยู่Vas a necesitar de algunos asistentes que te ayuden a cargar todas las bombas mientras tu buscas el <color=#ffaa00>Uranio</color>.Тебе понадобятся помощники — таскать твои бомбы, пока ты ищешь <color=#ffaa00>уран</color>.Sen <color=#ffaa00>Uranyum</color> ararken tüm bombalarını taşıyacak yardımcılara ihtiyacın olacak.Ngươi sẽ cần vài người hỗ trợ mang bom hộ khi ngươi tìm <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.You will need some assistants to help you carry all your bombs while you look for <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.You will need some assistants to help you carry all your bombs while you look for <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.You will need some assistants to help you carry all your bombs while you look for <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.You will need some assistants to help you carry all your bombs while you look for <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.You will need some assistants to help you carry all your bombs while you look for <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>.对了，给这位勇士也分配一些人手去寻找<color=#ffaa00>钛矿</color>，我喜欢这家伙。

1011100189v11_4_1既然是你找到货运枢纽【修改】，帮氏族渡过了难关，那就由你来<color=#ffaa00>发射</color>它吧！Well done monkey! I usually don't do this, but today you can press our Rocket's <color=#ffaa00>launch</color> button!Bien joué! C'est exceptionnel, mais vous l'avez mérité: allez-y, je vous autorise à appuyer sur le bouton de <color=#ffaa00>décollage</color> de la fusée!Gut gemacht, Affe! Normalerweise lasse ich das nicht zu, aber heute kannst du den <color=#ffaa00>Startknopf</color> unserer Rakete drücken!Muito bem, macaco! Não costumo fazer isso, mas hoje você pode apertar o botão de <color=#ffaa00>lançamento</color> do nosso foguete!做得好，猴子！今天我就破例讓你按下火箭的<color=#ffaa00>發射</color>按鈕吧！Bagus kera! Saya tidak biasa melakukannya, tapi hari ini kamu bisa menekan tombol <color=#ffaa00>luncurkan</color> Roket kita!ทำได้ดีมากเจ้าจ๋อ! จริงๆแล้วฉันไม่ทำเรื่องแบบนี้หรอกนะ คุณสามารถกดปุ่ม<color=#ffaa00>ฐานปล่อย</color>จรวดของพวกเราได้แล้ว!¡Bien hecho! Normalmente no hago esto, pero hoy podrás presionar nuestro botón de <color=#ffaa00>lanzamiento</color> del Cohete.Очень хорошо, примат! Обычно я так не делаю, но сегодня позволю тебе нажать кнопку <color=#ffaa00>запуска</color> нашей ракеты!Aferin maymun! Genelde bunu yapmam, ancak bugün Roketimizin <color=#ffaa00>fırlatma</color> düğmesine sen basabilirsin!Làm tốt lắm chú khỉ! Ta thường không làm điều này, nhưng hôm nay cậu có thể nhấn nút <color=#ffaa00>phóng</color> Hỏa Tiễn!Well done monkey! I usually don't do this, but today you can press our Rocket's <color=#ffaa00>launch</color> button!Well done monkey! I usually don't do this, but today you can press our Rocket's <color=#ffaa00>launch</color> button!Well done monkey! I usually don't do this, but today you can press our Rocket's <color=#ffaa00>launch</color> button!Well done monkey! I usually don't do this, but today you can press our Rocket's <color=#ffaa00>launch</color> button!既然是你找到钛矿，帮氏族渡过了难关，那就由你来<color=#ffaa00>发射</color>它吧！

1011100190v11_5_1不！我们的<color=#ffaa00>火箭</color>……赶紧把它找回来给我修好！For the bananas! What happened to our <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>?! We must find it and repair it!Nom d'une banane! Mais où est passé notre <color=#ffaa00>fusée</color>?! Vite, trouvez-la et réparez-la!Für die Bananen! Was ist mit unserer <color=#ffaa00>Rakete</color> passiert?! Wir müssen sie finden und reparieren!Macacos me mordam! O que aconteceu com o nosso <color=#ffaa00>foguete</color>?! Precisamos encontrá-lo e consertá-lo!我的大金币【修改】啊！我們的<color=#ffaa00>火箭</color>發生什麼事了？！我們一定要把它找回來修好！Demi pisang! Apa yang terjadi dengan <color=#ffaa00>Roket</color> kita?! Kita harus mencari dan memperbaikinya!เพื่อกล้วย! เกิดอะไรขึ้นกับ<color=#ffaa00>จรวด</color>ของพวกเรา? เราต้องออกตามหามันและซ่อมมันซะ!¡Por las bananas! ¿Qué ha pasado con nuestro <color=#ffaa00>Cohete</color>? ¡Debemos encontrarlo y repararlo!Какого банана! Что случилось с нашей <color=#ffaa00>ракетой</color>?! Мы должны найти ее и постараться починить!Muzlar için! <color=#ffaa00>Roketimize</color> ne oldu böyle?! Onu bulup tamir etmeliyiz!Vì chuối! <color=#ffaa00>Hỏa Tiễn</color> của ta bị gì thế?! Ta phải tìm và sửa nó thôi!For the bananas! What happened to our <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>?! We must find it and repair it!For the bananas! What happened to our <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>?! We must find it and repair it!For the bananas! What happened to our <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>?! We must find it and repair it!For the bananas! What happened to our <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>?! We must find it and repair it!For the bananas! What happened to our <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>?! We must find it and repair it!不！我们的<color=#ffaa00>火箭</color>……赶紧把它找回来给我修好！

Saya yakin kamu akan membantu kami untuk menang.ตอนนี้ฉันต้องไปแล้ว และต้องรวบรวมทีมค้นหา! <color=#ffaa00>เมือง</color>แห่งนี้อยู่ในมือของคุณแล้ว ฉันมั่นใจว่าคุณจะช่วยพวกเราให้บรรลุไปถึงชัยชนะได้!Debo organizar una partida de búsqueda. Не сомневаюсь, что ты поможешь нам добиться победы!Şimdi gitmem ve bir arama ekibi oluşturmam gerekiyor! Bu <color=#ffaa00>Şehir</color> sana emanet. Zafere ulaşmamıza yardım edeceğine eminim!Tôi phải đi ngay và tổ chức một cuộc tìm kiếm! <color=#ffaa00>Thành Phố</color> này hiện đang trong tay bạn. Удачи.Şimdi gitmem ve bir arama ekibi oluşturmam gerekiyor! Şimdi bu <color=#ffaa00>Şehri</color> senin maymun ellerine teslim ediyorum. İyi şanslar.Tôi phải đi ngay và tổ chức một cuộc tìm kiếm! Ich bin sicher, du wirst uns allen eine große Hilfe sein.Agora preciso ir e organizar um grupo de busca! Você que manda na <color=#ffaa00>cidade</color>. Sei que você vai nos ajudar muito.我要馬上組織搜索隊伍！這個<color=#ffaa00>城鎮</color>現在由你負責。你肯定能幫上忙的。Saya harus pergi sekarang untuk menyiapkan pesta pencarian! Kamu akan memimpin <color=#ffaa00>Kota</color> ini. Saya yakin kamu akan sangat membantu kami semua.ตอนนี้ฉันต้องไปแล้ว และต้องรวบรวมทีมค้นหา! คุณมีหน้าที่รับผิดชอบ<color=#ffaa00>เมือง</color>แห่งนี้ ฉันรู้สึกว่าคุณจะช่วยเหลือพวกเราทั้งหมดได้อย่างแน่นอน¡Debo irme y organizar una partida de búsqueda! Estás a cargo de esta <color=#ffaa00>Ciudad</color>. Estoy seguro que serás de gran ayuda.Мне пора — я собираю поисковый отряд! Оставляю <color=#ffaa00>город</color> под твоим руководством. Не сомневаюсь, что ты сможешь помочь нам.Şimdi gitmem ve bir arama ekibi oluşturmam gerekiyor! Artık bu <color=#ffaa00>Şehirden</color> sen sorumlusun. Hepimize çok yardımının dokunacağından eminim.Tôi phải đi ngay và tổ chức một cuộc tìm kiếm! Bạn sẽ đảm nhiệm <color=#ffaa00>Thành Phố</color> này. Tôi chắc chắn bạn sẽ giúp chúng ta đạt được chiến thắng!I must go now and organize a search party! You're in charge of this <color=#ffaa00>City</color>. I'm sure you'll be a great help to us all.I must go now and organize a search party! You're in charge of this <color=#ffaa00>City</color>. I'm sure you'll be a great help to us all.I must go now and organize a search party! You're in charge of this <color=#ffaa00>City</color>. I'm sure you'll be a great help to us all.I must go now and organize a search party! You're in charge of this <color=#ffaa00>City</color>. I'm sure you'll be a great help to us all.I must go now and organize a search party! You're in charge of this <color=#ffaa00>City</color>. I'm sure you'll be a great help to us all.命运是如此无常，现在我得去找回火箭了。这个<color=#ffaa00>基地</color>你来负责吧，我有预感，你会给我个惊喜！
190
1011100195v11_6_1_5我要去通知所有猴子全力找回火箭！这个<color=#ffaa00>基地</color>就由你来负责！I must go now and organize a search party! This <color=#ffaa00>City</color> is yours now. Don't disappoint me, monkey!Je dois partir en mission de recherche sans plus tarder! Je laisse <color=#ffaa00>la ville</color> à votre charge. Ne me décevez pas, primate!Ich muss jetzt gehen und einen Suchtrupp organisieren! Diese <color=#ffaa00>Stadt</color> gehört jetzt dir. Enttäusche mich nicht, Affe!Agora preciso ir e organizar um grupo de busca! Esta <color=#ffaa00>cidade</color> é sua agora. Não me decepcione, macaco!我要馬上組織搜索隊伍！這個<color=#ffaa00>城鎮</color>交給你。別令我失望，猴子！Saya harus pergi sekarang untuk menyiapkan pesta pencarian! <color=#ffaa00>Kota</color> ini di bawah pimpinanmu sekarang. Jangan kecewakan saya, kera!ตอนนี้ฉันต้องไปแล้ว และต้องรวบรวมทีมค้นหา! <color=#ffaa00>เมือง</color>แห่งนี้เป็นของคุณแล้ว อย่าทำให้ฉันผิดหวังล่ะ เจ้าจ๋อ!¡Debo irme ahora y organizar una partida de búsqueda! La <color=#ffaa00>Ciudad</color> es tuya ahora. ¡No me decepciones mono!Мне пора — я собираю поисковый отряд! <color=#ffaa00>Город</color> твой. Не подведи меня, примат!Şimdi gitmem ve bir arama ekibi oluşturmam gerekiyor! Artık bu <color=#ffaa00>Şehir</color> senin. Beni hayal kırıklığına uğratma maymun!Tôi phải đi ngay và tổ chức một cuộc tìm kiếm! Từ giờ, <color=#ffaa00>Thành Phố</color> này là của bạn. Đừng làm tôi thất vọng nhé chú khỉ!I must go now and organize a search party! This <color=#ffaa00>City</color> is yours now. Don't disappoint me, monkey!I must go now and organize a search party! 1011100196v11_7_1大人，您刚加入氏族，领袖特意安排我罗杰前来协助您寻找<color=#ffaa00>火箭</color>。Fear not, monkey. I know you are new here. I'm Roger, your assistant. I'll help you find that <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>.N'ayez crainte, gorillon! Je suis Roger, votre assistant. Je sais que vous êtes nouveau ici, mais ensemble, nous allons mettre la main sur cette <color=#ffaa00>fusée</color>!Keine Sorge, Affe. Ich weiß, du bist neu hier. Ich bin Roger, dein Assistent. Ich werde dir helfen, diese <color=#ffaa00>Rakete</color> zu finden.Não tema, macaco. Sei que é novo por aqui. Eu sou Roger, o seu assistente. Vou ajudar você a encontrar o <color=#ffaa00>foguete</color>.別怕，猴子。我知道你是新來的。我是你的助手，羅渣。我會幫你找回那支<color=#ffaa00>火箭</color>。Jangan takut, kera. Aku tahu kamu baru di sini. Saya Roger, asistenmu. Saya akan membantumu menemukan <color=#ffaa00>Roketnya</color>.อย่ากลัวไปเลยเจ้าจ๋อ ฉันรู้ว่านายเป็นหน้าใหม่ของที่นี่ ฉันโรเจอร์ ผู้ช่วยของคุณเอง ฉันจะช่วยคุณตามหา<color=#ffaa00>จรวด</color>ลำนั้นNo temas, mono. Sé que eres nuevo aquí. Yo soy Roger, tu asistente. Te ayudaré a encontrar ese <color=#ffaa00>Cohete</color>.Не волнуйтесь, я знаю, что вы у нас недавно. Я Роджер, ваш помощник. Я помогу вам найти <color=#ffaa00>ракету</color>.Korkma maymun. Burada yeni olduğunu biliyorum. Ben Roger, yardımcın. O <color=#ffaa00>Roketi</color> bulmana yardım edeceğim.Đừng sợ nữa, chú khỉ à. Tôi biết cậu mới vào đây. Tôi là Roger, trợ lý của cậu. Tôi sẽ giúp cậu tìm <color=#ffaa00>Hỏa Tiễn</color> đó.Fear not, monkey. I know you are new here. I'm Roger, your assistant. I'll help you find that <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>.Fear not, monkey. I know you are new here. I'm Roger, your assistant. I'll help you find that <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>.Fear not, monkey. I know you are new here. I'm Roger, your assistant. I'll help you find that <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>.Fear not, monkey. I know you are new here. I'm Roger, your assistant. I'll help you find that <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>.Fear not, monkey. I know you are new here. I'm Roger, your assistant. I'll help you find that <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>.大人，您刚加入氏族，领袖特意安排我罗杰前来协助您寻找<color=#ffaa00>火箭</color>。

1011100197v11_7_2说实话，很少有猴能被如此器重！您如果第一个找回火箭，那将非常完美。Very few monkeys are given such an important task on their first day. That's why you must be the first one to find our Rocket!Très peu de singes ont de telles responsabilités dès leur premier jour. Vous devez être le premier à trouver la fusée!Nur sehr wenige Affen erhalten an ihrem ersten Tag eine so wichtige Aufgabe. Deshalb musst du der Erste sein, der unsere Rakete findet!Pouquíssimos macacos recebem uma tarefa tão importante no primeiro dia. É por isso que você precisa encontrar o foguete primeiro!第一天上任就被託付如此重任的猴子可沒幾隻。所以你必須率先找到我們的火箭！Kera yang diberi tugas penting pada hari pertamanya sangat langka. Karenanya, kamu harus jadi orang pertama yang menemukan Roket kita!เจ้าจ๋อน้อยตัวมากที่ได้รับภารกิจสำคัญเช่นนี้ในวันแรก นั่นคือเหตุผลที่คุณต้องเป็นคนแรกที่พบจรวดของเรา!Muy pocos monos reciben una tarea tan importante en su primer día. ¡Por eso, debes de ser el primero en encontrar nuestro Cohete!Немногим обезьянам в первый же день достается такая важная задача. Так что вы должны найти нашу ракету раньше всех!Pek az maymuna daha ilk gününden böle önemli bir görev verilir. Bu yüzden Roketimizi ilk bulan sen olmalısın!Rất ít chú khỉ được giao cho một nhiệm vụ quan trọng như vậy trong ngày đầu tiên gia nhập. Đó là lý do bạn phải là chú khỉ đầu tiên tìm ra Hỏa Tiễn của ta!Very few monkeys are given such an important task on their first day. That's why you must be the first one to find our Rocket!Very few monkeys are given such an important task on their first day. That's why you must be the first one to find our Rocket!Very few monkeys are given such an important task on their first day. That's why you must be the first one to find our Rocket!Very few monkeys are given such an important task on their first day. That's why you must be the first one to find our Rocket!Very few monkeys are given such an important task on their first day. That's why you must be the first one to find our Rocket!说实话，很少有猴能被如此器重！您如果第一个找回火箭，那将非常完美。
193
1011100198v11_7_3火箭坠落在层层<color=#ffaa00>迷雾</color>之中，这些迷雾往往掩藏着危险。The Rocket crashed into an area covered in <color=#ffaa00>fog</color>, but If we go in, we'll never find our way out.La fusée s'est écrasée dans <color=#ffaa00>la brume</color>. Si nous y pénétrons, nous perdrons notre chemin.Die Rakete ist über einem Gebiet mit <color=#ffaa00>Nebel</color> abgestürzt, aber wenn wir da reingehen, finden wir bestimmt nicht mehr zurück.O foguete caiu numa área coberta de <color=#ffaa00>névoa</color>. Mas, se entrarmos, não vamos conseguir sair.火箭墜落在<color=#ffaa00>迷霧</color>之中，如果我們跑進去，可能永遠都回不來了。Roket jatuh di area yang diselimuti <color=#ffaa00>kabut</color>, tapi kalau kita masuk, kita tidak akan bisa keluar.จรวดได้ตกลงมายังพื้นที่ที่ปกคลุมไปด้วย<color=#ffaa00>หมอก</color> แต่ถ้าหากเราเข้าไปแล้ว เราจะไม่มีทางหาทางออกไปได้แน่ๆEl cohete se estrelló en un área cubierta por la <color=#ffaa00>niebla</color>, pero si entramos ahí, nunca encontraremos el camino de regreso.Ракета разбилась в области, укрытой <color=#ffaa00>туманом</color>. Если мы отправимся туда, то не найдем дорогу обратно.Roket <color=#ffaa00>sisli</color> bir bölgeye çakıldı, ancak oraya girersek dönüş yolunu bir daha bulamayabiliriz.Hỏa Tiễn đã rơi xuống khu vực đầy <color=#ffaa00>sương mù</color>, nhưng nếu ta đi vào, ta sẽ không bao giờ tìm được lối thoát.The Rocket crashed into an area covered in <color=#ffaa00>fog</color>, but If we go in, we'll never find our way out.The Rocket crashed into an area covered in <color=#ffaa00>fog</color>, but If we go in, we'll never find our way out.The Rocket crashed into an area covered in <color=#ffaa00>fog</color>, but If we go in, we'll never find our way out.The Rocket crashed into an area covered in <color=#ffaa00>fog</color>, but If we go in, we'll never find our way out.The Rocket crashed into an area covered in <color=#ffaa00>fog</color>, but If we go in, we'll never find our way out.火箭坠落在层层<color=#ffaa00>迷雾</color>之中，这些迷雾往往掩藏着危险。
194
1011100199v11_7_4所幸氏族有专业的侦察机器人【修改】驱散迷雾，大人只要在基地建立情报站就能安置它们！Luckily, our Scout Monkeys can help us explore and uncover all that fog! But first, you'll need to build an Intel Station to accommodate them.Heureusement, nos éclaireurs peuvent explorer et dissiper cette brume. Mais d'abord, construisez un centre de renseignement pour les héberger.Zum Glück können unsere Kundschafter-Affen uns helfen, diesen Nebel zu erkunden! Aber zuerst musst du ein Späherlager bauen, damit sie eine Unterkunft haben.Felizmente, nossos macacos batedores podem ajudar a explorar toda essa névoa! Mas primeiro, você precisará construir um posto de vigilância para eles.幸好，偵察猿可以幫我們採索並驅散迷霧！但你首先要建造一個情報站安置他們。Untungnya, Kera Pengintai kita bisa membantu menjelajahi dan menghilangkan semua kabut itu! Tapi, kamu harus membangun Stasiun Intelijen untuk mengakomodasi mereka lebih dulu.โชคดีจริง ๆ เจ้าจ๋อหน่วยสอ ดแนมของเราช่วยเราสำรวจและค้น พบหมอกทั้งหมด! แค่ก่อนอื่น คุณต้องสร้างสถานีข่าวกรองเสียก่อนเพือรองรับเจ้าพวกจ๋อPor suerte, ¡nuestro mono Rastreador nos puede ayudar a explorar y despejar toda esa niebla! Pero, primero, necesitarás construir una Estación de Inteligencia para alojarlos.К счастью, наши обезьяны-разведчики могут исследовать область и развеять туман! Но сначала нужно построить разведстанцию, где они будут базироваться.Neyse ki Gözcü Maymunlar tüm bu sisi keşfetmemize ve dağıtmamıza yardım edebilirler. Ama önce onların barınacağı bir İstihbarat İstasyonu inşa etmelisin.May mắn thay, những chú Khỉ Trinh Sát của chúng ta có thể giúp tìm hiểu và xua tan đám sương mù đó! Nhưng trước tiên, bạn sẽ cần xây dựng một Trạm Tình Báo cho họ cư trú.Luckily, our Scout Monkeys can help us explore and uncover all that fog! But first, you'll need to build an Intel Station to accommodate them.Luckily, our Scout Monkeys can help us explore and uncover all that fog! But first, you'll need to build an Intel Station to accommodate them.Luckily, our Scout Monkeys can help us explore and uncover all that fog! But first, you'll need to build an Intel Station to accommodate them.Luckily, our Scout Monkeys can help us explore and uncover all that fog! But first, you'll need to build an Intel Station to accommodate them.Luckily, our Scout Monkeys can help us explore and uncover all that fog! But first, you'll need to build an Intel Station to accommodate them.所幸氏族有专业的侦察机器人【修改】驱散迷雾，大人只要在基地建立情报站就能安置它们！
195
1011100200v11_8_1大人，侦察机器人【修改】前来报到！您想让我侦察什么？野狼【修改】的宝库？还是罗杰的私房钱？What can I look for you, boss? Some Treasure chests? Mutants? Maybe some females?Que puis-je chercher pour vous, chef? Des coffres à trésors? Des mutants? Des guenons?Was kann ich für dich suchen, Chef? Ein paar Schatztruhen? Mutanten? Vielleicht ein paar Weibchen?O que posso procurar para você, chefia? Baús de tesouro? Símios mutantes? Talvez algumas fêmeas?老大，要我幫你找些什麼嗎？寶箱？變種猴子？還是漂亮的女猴子？Apa yang bisa saya cari untukmu, bos? Beberapa Peti harta karun? Kera Mutan? Mungkin sejumlah wanita?ให้ฉันหาอะไรให้คุณดีล่ะ บอส? หีบสมบัติบางส่วน? พวกจ๋อมิวแตนด์? หรือบางทีอาจจะเป็นสาว ๆ ?¿Qué puedo buscar por ti, jefe? ¿Algunos cofres de tesoro? ¿Monos mutantes? Tal vez, ¿algunas hembras?Что мне для вас найти, шеф? Сундуки с сокровищами? Обезьян-мутантов? Может, самок?Senin için ne arayabilirim patron? Bazı Hazine sandıklarını mı? Mutant Maymunları mı? Belki de birkaç dişi?Thưa sếp, tôi có thể tìm gì cho anh? Rương Kho Báu? Vượn Đột Biến? Hay là một vài nàng khỉ chăng?What can I look for you, boss? Some Treasure chests? Mutants? Maybe some females?What can I look for you, boss? Some Treasure chests? Mutants? Maybe some females?What can I look for you, boss? Some Treasure chests? Mutants? Maybe some females?What can I look for you, boss? Some Treasure chests? Mutants? Maybe some females?What can I look for you, boss? Some Treasure chests? Mutants? Maybe some females?大人，侦察机器人【修改】前来报到！您想让我侦察什么？野狼【修改】的宝库？还是罗杰的私房钱？

1011100201v11_9_1咳，别听他瞎说。让他去<color=#ffaa00>迷雾</color>中侦察火箭的下落吧。Don't listen to this monkey. Just send him into the <color=#ffaa00>fog</color> to search for our Rocket.N'écoutez pas ce singe, mais contentez-vous de l'envoyer dans <color=#ffaa00>la brume</color> à la recherche de notre fusée.Hör nicht auf diesen Affen. Schick ihn einfach in den <color=#ffaa00>Nebel</color>, um nach unserer Rakete zu suchen.Não dê ouvidos a esse macaco. Mande ele procurar o nosso foguete na <color=#ffaa00>névoa</color>.別聽這隻猴子胡說。把他派進<color=#ffaa00>迷霧</color>裡尋找我們的火箭吧。Jangan dengarkan kera ini. Utus dia ke dalam <color=#ffaa00>kabut</color> untuk mencari Roket kita.อย่าไปฟังเจ้าจ๋อตัวนี้มากนัก ส่งเขาเข้าไปยัง<color=#ffaa00>หมอก</color>เพื่อตามหาจรวดของพวกเราซะNo escuches a este mono. Solamente mándalo a la <color=#ffaa00>niebla</color> a buscar nuestro Cohete.Не слушайте этого дурня. Просто отправьте его в <color=#ffaa00>туман</color> искать нашу ракету.Bu maymunu dinleme. Onu <color=#ffaa00>sisin</color> içine gönder de Roketimizi arasın.Đừng nghe con khỉ này. 1011100202v11_10_1大人！我发现了火箭残骸！I found some metal pieces here!J'ai trouvé de la tôle froissée!Ich habe hier ein paar Metallstücke gefunden!Encontrei peças de metal aqui!我在這裡找到了一些金屬碎片！Saya menemukan sejumlah potongan logam di sini!ฉันเจอชิ้นส่วนเหล็กบางส่วนตรงนี้!¡He encontrado algunas piezas de metal aquí!Я нашел тут какие-то металлические детали!Burada bazı metal parçalar buldum!Tôi tìm thấy một số mảnh kim loại ở đây!I found some metal pieces here!I found some metal pieces here!I found some metal pieces here!I found some metal pieces here!I found some metal pieces here!大人！我发现了火箭残骸！
198
1011100203v11_11_1别激动，这只是一些零件残骸！火箭本体应该就在附近！继续搜索！It looks like our Scout Monkey found a Rocket Wreckage! Keep looking, maybe there are other pieces nearby.Apparemment, l'éclaireur est tombé sur une épave de fusée. Peut-être y a-t-il d'autres pièces intéressantes aux alentours.Sieht so aus, als hätte unser Kundschafter-Affe ein Raketenwrack gefunden! Sucht weiter, vielleicht gibt es in der Nähe noch weitere Trümmer.Nosso macaco batedor encontrou destroços de foguete! Continue procurando, talvez tenha mais peças por perto.偵察猿似乎找到了一塊火箭殘骸！繼續找找看，附近可能會有其他碎片。Sepertinya Kera Pengintai kita menemukan Puing Roket! Terus cari, mungkin ada potongan lain di sekitar sini.ดูเหมือนว่าเจ้าจ๋อหน่วยสอดแนมของเราเจอซากจรวดเข้าให้! มองหาต่อไป อาจจะมีชิ้นส่วนอื่น ๆ อยู่ใกล้ก็ได้นะ¡Parece que nuestro mono rastreador encontró deshechos del cohete! Sigue buscando, probablemente hay más piezas cerca.Похоже, наша обезьяна-разведчик обнаружила обломки ракеты! Продолжайте поиски — может быть, поблизости есть и другие детали.Görünüşe göre Gözcü Maymunumuz bir Roket Enkazı buldu! Bakmaya devam et, belki yakında başka parçalar da vardır.Có vẻ như Khỉ Trinh Sát của chúng ta đã tìm thấy một mảnh Xác Hỏa Tiễn! Hãy tiếp tục tìm kiếm, có thể có những mảnh khác gần đó.It looks like our Scout Monkey found a Rocket Wreckage! Keep looking, maybe there are other pieces nearby.It looks like our Scout Monkey found a Rocket Wreckage! Keep looking, maybe there are other pieces nearby.It looks like our Scout Monkey found a Rocket Wreckage! Keep looking, maybe there are other pieces nearby.It looks like our Scout Monkey found a Rocket Wreckage! Keep looking, maybe there are other pieces nearby.It looks like our Scout Monkey found a Rocket Wreckage! Keep looking, maybe there are other pieces nearby.别激动，这只是一些零件残骸！火箭本体应该就在附近！继续搜索！

1011100204v11_12_1瞧瞧这是什么？又一块残骸！What's this? Another Rocket Wreckage!Qu'est-ce que...? Une autre épave de fusée!Was ist denn das? Noch ein Raketenwrack!O que é isso? Mais destroços de foguete!這是甚麼？另一塊火箭殘骸！Apa ini? Puing Roket lainnya!นี่คืออะไรกัน? ซากจรวดอีกหรือนี่!¿Qué es esto? ¡Otro deshecho del cohete!Что это? Снова обломки ракеты!Bu nedir? 1011100206v11_14_1看！<color=#ffaa00>火箭</color>！它看上去很糟糕！快去检查一下它的受损情况！Over here! Oh no, the <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color> is now destroyed! Let's see if we can save something out of it.Regardez par ici! Oh non, la <color=#ffaa00>fusée</color> est complètement détruite! Voyons s'il reste quelque chose à sauver.Da drüben! Oh nein, die <color=#ffaa00>Rakete</color> ist zerstört! Olamaz, <color=#ffaa00>Roket</color> yok edildi! Buradan bir şey kurtarabilir miyiz bir bakalım.Đằng này! Ôi không, <color=#ffaa00>Hỏa Tiễn</color> đã bị phá hủy! 1011100209v11_16_1所有来找火箭的猴子都得死！你们根本不知道自己在干什么蠢事！You are here to die, monkeys! We'll enjoy having you as our dinner!Votre heure a sonné, primates! Vous finirez dans nos assiettes ce soir!Ihr seid hier, um zu sterben, ihr Affen! Wir werden euch zum Abendessen verspeisen!Vocês vieram morrer, macacos! Vamos adorar jantar vocês!你要葬身此地了，猴子！我們要把你做成今天的晚餐！Kamu cari mati di sini, kera! Kami akan menikmatimu sebagai makan malam kami!เจ้าจ๋อ! คุณมาที่นี่เพื่อตาย เราจะมีความสุขไปกับการทานมื้อค่ำของพวกเรากัน!¡Están aquí para morir, monos! ¡Nos complace que formen parte del menú de nuestra cena!Готовьтесь к смерти, обезьяны! Вы попадете к нам на ужин!Burada öleceksiniz maymunlar! Sizi akşam yemeğinde yiyeceğiz!Các ngươi sẽ chết tại đây, những chú khỉ kia! Ta sẽ tận hưởng bữa tối món thịt khỉ này!You are here to die, monkeys! We'll enjoy having you as our dinner!You are here to die, monkeys! We'll enjoy having you as our dinner!You are here to die, monkeys! We'll enjoy having you as our dinner!You are here to die, monkeys! We'll enjoy having you as our dinner!You are here to die, monkeys! We'll enjoy having you as our dinner!所有来找火箭的猴子都得回去！你们根本不知道自己在干什么蠢事！

1011100212v11_19_1观看比赛并送上喝彩，甚至能让他们直接加盟基地。大人，我们得试试。They enjoy the sound of applause and if they like you, maybe they'll consider joining your cause.Ils adorent le bruit des applaudissements et si vous leur tapez dans l'œil, peut-être qu'ils se joindront à votre cause.Sie lieben den Klang des Applauses und falls sie dich mögen, werden sie vielleicht in Betracht ziehen, sich dir anzuschließen.Eles amam o som dos aplausos e, se gostarem de você, podem considerar se juntar à sua causa.他們十分享受別人的讚賞，如果他們喜歡你，也許會考慮加入你的麾下。Mereka menyukai suara tepuk tangan dan jika mereka menyukaimu, mungkin mereka akan mempertimbangkan untuk membantu menyelesaikan misimu.พวกจ๋อสนุกสนานไปกับเสียงปรบมือและพวกเขาดูชอบคุณนะ บางทีพวกเขาอาจพิจารณาเข้าร่วมทีมกับคุณอยู่ก็ได้นะLos luchadores nacieron para combatir y si les caes bien, probablemente consideren unirse a tu causa.Герои обожают аплодисменты, и если вы им понравитесь, то вполне возможно, что они захотят присоединиться к вам.Alkış seslerinden keyif alırlar ve eğer seni severlerse belki sana katılmayı düşünebilirler.Họ thích tiếng vỗ tay, và nếu họ thích bạn, có thể họ sẽ cân nhắc việc chiến đấu cùng bạn.They enjoy the sound of applause and if they like you, maybe they'll consider joining your cause.They enjoy the sound of applause and if they like you, maybe they'll consider joining your cause.They enjoy the sound of applause and if they like you, maybe they'll consider joining your cause.They enjoy the sound of applause and if they like you, maybe they'll consider joining your cause.They enjoy the sound of applause and if they like you, maybe they'll consider joining your cause.观看比赛并送上喝彩，甚至能让他们直接加盟基地。大人，我们得试试。

Wir brauchen jemanden, der uns helfen kann, die Mutanten zu bekämpfen und unsere <color=#ffaa00>Rakete</color> zurückzubringen!Um combatente na hora certa, gostei! Kita perlu orang yang bisa membantu kita mengusir Kera Mutan dan merebut kembali Roket kita!นักสู้เข้ามาได้ถูกเวลา ฉันชอบจริงๆ! เราต้องการใครสักคนที่สามารถช่วยเราต่อสู้กับพวกจ๋อมิวแตนด์พวกนี้และนำ<color=#ffaa00>จรวด</color>ของเรากลับคืนมา!¡Un luchador en el momento justo, me gusta eso! ¡Necesitamos ayuda para luchar contra los Monos Mutantes y poder recuperar nuestro <color=#ffaa00>Cohete</color>!Герой — и очень вовремя — мне это нравится! 1011100214v11_20_2_1对付<color=#ffaa00>野狼【修改】</color>？这可是我的强项！给我点人手，我去带回火箭！Fight? <color=#ffaa00>Mutants</color>? What are we waiting for?! Give me some troops and I'll lead them into battle!De la baston? Des <color=#ffaa00>mutants</color>? Qu'attendons-nous? Confiez-moi vos troupes, je les mènerai au combat!Kämpfen? <color=#ffaa00>Mutanten</color>? Worauf warten wir noch?! Gib mir ein paar Truppen und ich werde sie in die Schlacht führen!Lutar? <color=#ffaa00>Símios mutantes</color>? O que estamos esperando?! Me dê umas tropas que eu as lidero em batalha!打架？<color=#ffaa00>變種猴子</color>？我們還在等什麼？！給我一些部隊，我會帶他們殺入敵陣！Bertempur? <color=#ffaa00>Melawan Kera Mutan</color>? Tunggu apa lagi?! Siapkan pasukan dan saya akan pimpin mereka dalam pertempuran!ต่อสู้งั้นหรือ? <color=#ffaa00>พวกจ๋อมิวแตนด์</color>งั้นหรือ? แล้วเราจะรออะไรกันอีกล่ะ?! ส่งกองทัพบางส่วนมากับฉัน แล้วฉำจะนำพวกเขาเข้าสู้รบเอง!¿Luchar? ¿<color=#ffaa00>Monos Mutantes</color>? ¿Qué estamos esperando? ¡Dame unas cuantas tropas y yo traeré tu cohete de regreso!Будет битва? С <color=#ffaa00>обезьянами-мутантами</color>? Так чего же мы ждем?! Дайте мне войска, и я поведу их в бой!Savaşmak mı? <color=#ffaa00>Mutant Maymunlarla</color> mı? Ne bekliyoruz ki?! Bana biraz birlik ver de onlarla savaşa gideyim!Đánh nhau? Với lũ <color=#ffaa00>Vượn Đột Biến</color> à? Ta còn đợi gì nữa?! Đưa tôi một số binh lính và tôi sẽ dẫn đầu vào trận chiến!Fight? <color=#ffaa00>Mutants</color>? What are we waiting for?! Give me some troops and I'll lead them into battle!Fight? <color=#ffaa00>Mutants</color>? What are we waiting for?! Give me some troops and I'll lead them into battle!Fight? <color=#ffaa00>Mutants</color>? What are we waiting for?! Give me some troops and I'll lead them into battle!Fight? <color=#ffaa00>Mutants</color>? What are we waiting for?! Give me some troops and I'll lead them into battle!Fight? <color=#ffaa00>Mutants</color>? What are we waiting for?! Give me some troops and I'll lead them into battle!对付<color=#ffaa00>野狼【修改】</color>？这可是我的强项！给我点人手，我去带回火箭！

1011100215v11_20_2_2<color=#ffaa00>野狼【修改】</color>？我的钻头可饶不了它们！给我点人手，我把火箭带回来！<color=#ffaa00>Mutants</color>? I can have them for breakfast. I'll bring your Rocket back!<color=#ffaa00>Des mutants</color>? Confiez-moi vos troupes, je rapporterai votre fusée!<color=#ffaa00>Mutanten</color>? Das höre ich gern! Gib mir ein paar Truppen und ich bringe deine Rakete zurück!<color=#ffaa00>Símios mutantes</color>? Dá nem pra malhar. Eu recupero seu foguete!<color=#ffaa00>變種猴子</color>？！不值一提。我會幫你把火箭搶回來！<color=#ffaa00>Kera Mutan</color>? Saya bisa kalahkan dengan mudah. Me los como de desayuno. ¡Traeré tu Cohete de regreso!<color=#ffaa00>Обезьяны-мутанты</color>? Я их ем на завтрак! Я верну вашу ракету!<color=#ffaa00>Mutant Maymunlar</color> mı? Kahvaltıda alabilirim. Roketini geri getireceğim!<color=#ffaa00>Vượn Đột Biến </color> à? Tôi sẽ ăn chúng như món ăn sáng. Tôi sẽ mang Hỏa Tiễn của bạn trở lại!<color=#ffaa00>Mutants</color>? I can have them for breakfast. I'll bring your Rocket back!<color=#ffaa00>Mutants</color>? I can have them for breakfast. I'll bring your Rocket back!<color=#ffaa00>Mutants</color>? I can have them for breakfast. I'll bring your Rocket back!<color=#ffaa00>Mutants</color>? I can have them for breakfast. I'll bring your Rocket back!<color=#ffaa00>Mutants</color>? 1011100223v11_24_2_1我喜欢这个基地。有什么需要我帮忙的吗？I like this City. Seems like a nice place to settle down. Tell me what you need, and I'll be glad to help.Cette ville me plaît, je veux m'y installer. Donnez-moi vos instructions, je ferai de mon mieux.Mir gefällt diese Stadt. Scheint ein netter Ort zu sein, um sich niederzulassen. Sag mir, was du brauchst, und ich werde dir gerne helfen.Adoro essa cidade. Parece um bom lugar para ficar. Me diga o que precisa e terei prazer em ajudar.我喜歡這座城鎮。看來是個安身的好地方。有什麼需要儘管告訴我，我樂意效勞。Saya suka kota ini. Sepertinya merupakan tempat yang bagus untuk menetap. Beri tahu saya hal yang kamu perlukan, dan saya akan membantumu dengan senang hati.ฉันชอบเมืองนี้นะ ดูเหมือนว่าจะเป็นสถานที่ที่ดีเหมาะแก่การตั้งหลักปักฐาน อยากได้อะไรให้บอกฉันและฉันยินดีที่จะช่วยMe gusta esta Ciudad. Parece un buen lugar para asentarme. Dime qué necesitas y estaré muy feliz de ayudarte.Мне нравится этот город. Неплохое место, чтобы обосноваться. Скажите, что вам нужно, и я с радостью помогу.Bu Şehri seviyorum. Yerleşmek için güzel bir yere benziyor. İhtiyacını söylersen yardım etmekten mutluluk duyarım.Tôi thích Thành Phố này. Có vẻ như đây là một nơi tốt đẹp để sinh sống. Nếu bạn cần gì thì gọi cho tôi, tôi rất sẵn lòng giúp đỡ.I like this City. Seems like a nice place to settle down. 1011100224v11_24_2_2大人的慷慨令我欣赏。虽然我喜欢穿成这样，但我可不是什么矿工！You look like a good leader. But there's one thing you need to know. I'm not a real miner!Vous avez l'air d'un bon leader. Mais je dois vous avouer une chose: j'aime cette tenue, mais je ne suis pas un vrai mineur!Du scheinst ein guter Anführer zu sein. Aber es gibt eine Sache, die du wissen musst. Mir gefällt dieses Outfit, aber ich bin kein echter Bergmann!Você parece um bom líder, mas tem algo que você precisa saber. Eu gosto dessas roupas, mas não sou um minerador de verdade!你似乎是一個好領袖。但有一點你要記住。我喜歡這套衣服，但我可不是礦工！Kamu terlihat seperti pemimpin yang baik. Tapi ada satu hal yang perlu kamu ketahui. Saya bukan penambang sejati!คุณดูเหมือนกับว่าเป็นผู้นำที่ดีนะ แต่มีบางสิ่งอยู่คุณต้องรู้ไว้ ฉันไม่ใช่คนงานเหมืองสักหน่อย!Parece que eres un buen líder. Pero hay una cosa que necesitas saber. ¡No soy en realidad un minero!Я вижу, что вы достойный предводитель. Но есть кое-что, что вы должны знать... Мне нравится этот наряд, но я не настоящий шахтер!İyi bir lidere benziyorsun. Ancak bilmen gereken bir şey var. Bu kıyafetleri seviyorum, ancak ben gerçek bir madenci değilim!Bạn trông ra dáng một nhà lãnh đạo tốt. Nhưng có một điều bạn cần biết. Tôi không phải là một thợ mỏ thực sự!You look like a good leader. But there's one thing you need to know. I'm not a real miner!You look like a good leader. But there's one thing you need to know. I'm not a real miner!You look like a good leader. But there's one thing you need to know. I'm not a real miner!You look like a good leader. But there's one thing you need to know. I'm not a real miner!You look like a good leader. But there's one thing you need to know. I'm not a real miner!大人的慷慨令我欣赏。虽然我喜欢穿成这样，但我可不是什么矿工！

Also, was soll ich jetzt tun?Fico feliz em estar ao seu serviço. Então, o que eu faço agora?很榮幸能助你一臂之力。有任務嗎？Senang bisa melayanimu. 1011100226v11_24_2_4你就是基地首领？给我一些有难度的任务吧！Are you the leader of this City? I'd love to live here then!Vous dirigez cette ville? Alors je souhaite y poser mes bagages!Du bist der Anführer dieser Stadt? Dann würde ich gerne hier leben!Você que manda nessa cidade? Eu adoraria morar aqui!你是這座城鎮的首領？那我就可以安心住在這裡了！Apakah kamu pemimpin kota ini? Jika demikian, aku ingin tinggal di sini!คุณเป็นผู้นำของเมืองนี้งั้นหรือ? งั้นฉันก็อยากจะอยู่ที่นี่!¿Eres el líder de esta Ciudad? ¡Entonces me encantaría vivir aquí!Вы возглавляете этот город? Тогда я с радостью здесь поселюсь!Bu Şehrin lideri sen misin? O zaman burada yaşamayı çok isterim!Bạn là lãnh đạo của Thành Phố này ư? 1011100227v11_24_2_5我的锁链从不让伙伴失望！没人愿意与我为敌！You can trust me. I'll never let you down in a fight!Vous pouvez me faire confiance: je ne recule jamais face à l'ennemi!Du kannst mir vertrauen. Ich werde dich in einem Kampf niemals im Stich lassen!Pode confiar em mim. Eu nunca vou te decepcionar numa briga!相信我吧。要打架時，我絕不會令你失望！Kamu bisa mempercayaiku. Aku tidak akan pernah mengecewakanmu dalam pertempuran!คุณเชื่อใจฉันได้เลย ฉันจะไม่ทำให้คุณผิดหวังในการต่อสู้แน่ ๆ !Puedes confiar en mí. ¡Nunca te decepcionaré en una pelea!Можете довериться мне — я никогда не подведу вас в бою!Bana güvenebilirsin. Seni savaşta asla yüzüstü bırakmam!Bạn có thể tin tưởng tôi. Vào thực chiến, tôi sẽ không bao giờ để bạn thất vọng đâu!You can trust me. I'll never let you down in a fight!You can trust me. I'll never let you down in a fight!You can trust me. I'll never let you down in a fight!You can trust me. I'll never let you down in a fight!You can trust me. I'll never let you down in a fight!我的锁链从不让伙伴失望！没人愿意与我为敌！

Schau, wir haben Energie. <color=#ffaa00>Teleportieren</color> wir die Stadt näher an die Rakete, um etwas Zeit zu sparen!Precisamos acelerar! Olha, temos energia. Vamos <color=#ffaa00>teletransportar</color> a cidade para mais perto do foguete para economizar tempo!我們要快點！我們有足夠的能量儲備。省點時間，把我們的城鎮<color=#ffaa00>傳送</color>到火箭附近吧！Kita harus cepat! Давайте <color=#ffaa00>телепортируем</color> город поближе к ракете, чтобы сэкономить время!¡Debemos de apurarnos! 1011100230v11_27_1看！<color=#ffaa00>火箭</color>在那……等等，情况不对！Look, there's the <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>... wait a second, there's something wrong.Regardez, c'est la <color=#ffaa00>fusée</color>! Par contre, il y a quelque chose qui cloche...Schau, da ist die <color=#ffaa00>Rakete</color> ... warte eine Sekunde, da stimmt etwas nicht.Veja. Ali está o <color=#ffaa00>foguete</color>... Espere aí, tem algo de errado.看，<color=#ffaa00>火箭</color>就在那裡……且慢，有些不對勁。Lihat, itu <color=#ffaa00>Roketnya</color>… tunggu sebentar, ada yang tidak beres.ดูนั่น นั่นมัน<color=#ffaa00>จรวด...</color> เดี๋ยวก่อน มีบางอย่างดูผิดปกติMira, allí está el <color=#ffaa00>Cohete</color>... espera, algo anda mal.Смотрите, вот <color=#ffaa00>ракета</color>... минуточку, тут что-то не так!Bak, <color=#ffaa00>Roket</color> orada... bir saniye, ters giden bir şey var.Nhìn kìa, có một <color=#ffaa00>Hỏa Tiễn</color>... đợi đã, có gì đó không đúng.Look, there's the <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>... wait a second, there's something wrong.Look, there's the <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>... wait a second, there's something wrong.Look, there's the <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>... wait a second, there's something wrong.Look, there's the <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>... wait a second, there's something wrong.Look, there's the <color=#ffaa00>Rocket</color>... wait a second, there's something wrong.看！<color=#ffaa00>火箭</color>在那……等等，情况不对！

1011100231v11_28_1愚蠢的地表猴，居然自己送上门来了！哈哈哈哈哈！We were waiting for you, monkeys! Your time has come! Grrrrrrrrr!Nous vous attendions de pied ferme, primates! Votre heure a sonné! Grrrr!Wir warten auf euch, Affen! Eure Zeit ist gekommen! Grrrrrrrrr!Estávamos esperando por vocês, macacos! Sua hora chegou! Grrrrrrrr!我們一直在等你們呢，猴子！是時候受死了！啊啊啊啊！Kami menantikanmu, para kera! Waktumu telah tiba! Grrrrrrrrr!เรากำลังรอพวกแกอยู่เลยพวกจ๋อ! ถึงเวลาของพวกแกแล้ว! กรรรรร!¡Los estamos esperando, monos! ¡Su hora ha llegado! ¡Grrrrrrrrr!Мы ждали вас, обезьяны! Вам пришел конец! Гр-р-р-р!Maymunlar, sizi bekliyoruz! Beklediğiniz an geldi! Grrrrrrrrr!Chúng tôi vẫn đang chờ đây, hỡi các chúa khỉ! Thời gian đến rồi! Grrrrrrrrr!We were waiting for you, monkeys! Your time has come! Grrrrrrrrr!We were waiting for you, monkeys! Your time has come! Grrrrrrrrr!We were waiting for you, monkeys! Your time has come! Grrrrrrrrr!We were waiting for you, monkeys! Your time has come! Grrrrrrrrr!We were waiting for you, monkeys! Your time has come! Grrrrrrrrr!愚蠢的地表猴，居然自己送上门来了！哈哈哈哈哈！

1011100234v11_31_1糟糕！好像捅了野狼【修改】老巢了！大人，我们兵力不足，不想全军覆没的话，必须离开这儿！A pack of Mutants is right here! We are outnumbered! We must retreat or they'll eat us alive!Oh non, une troupe de mutants se dirige vers nous! Ils sont beaucoup trop nombreux! Fuyons avant qu'ils ne nous transforment en chair à saucisse!Ein Rudel Mutanten ist hier! Wir sind in der Unterzahl! Wir müssen uns zurückziehen, sonst fressen sie uns bei lebendigem Leibe!Um bando de símios mutantes está aqui! Estamos em menor número! Precisamos recuar, senão vão nos devorar vivos!這裡有一群變種猴子！我們被包圍了！我們必須先撤退，不然會被牠們生吞活剝的！Sekawanan Kera Mutan datang! Kita kalah banyak! Kita harus mundur atau mereka akan memakan kita hidup-hidup!ฝูงมิวแตนด์ขาวมาอยู่ตรงนี้แล้ว! คนของเราไม่เพียงพอ! เราต้องถอยกลับหรือไม่พวกมันก็จะมากินเรากันเป็นๆนะ!¡Hay un grupo de Mutantes Blancos! Nos superan en número. ¡Debemos retirarnos o nos comerán vivos!Обезьян-мутантов здесь целая стая! Мы в меньшинстве! Нужно отступить, не то нас съедят живьем!Mutant Maymunlar tam da burada! Sayıları bizden fazla! Geri çekilmezsek bizi canlı canlı yiyecekler!Một lũ Vượn Đột Biến Trắng đến đây rồi! Chúng ta đã bị số đông áp đảo! Ta phải rút lui trước khi chúng nuốt sống chúng ta!A pack of Mutants is right here! We are outnumbered! We must retreat or they'll eat us alive!A pack of Mutants is right here! We are outnumbered! We must retreat or they'll eat us alive!A pack of Mutants is right here! We are outnumbered! We must retreat or they'll eat us alive!A pack of Mutants is right here! We are outnumbered! We must retreat or they'll eat us alive!A pack of Mutants is right here! We are outnumbered! We must retreat or they'll eat us alive!糟糕！好像捅了野狼【修改】老巢了！大人，我们兵力不足，不想全军覆没的话，必须离开这儿！

1011100235v11_32_1还好基地能量足够支持<color=#ffaa00>迁城</color>，这下安全了！That was close! Luckily we had energy saved up for <color=#ffaa00>teleportation</color>. We are safe now!Ce n'est pas passé loin! Heureusement que nous avions assez d'énergie pour nous <color=#ffaa00>téléporter</color>! Nous sommes en sécurité ici.Das war knapp! Wir können froh sein, dass wir etwas Energie für die <color=#ffaa00>Teleportation</color> gespart hatten. Jetzt sind wir in Sicherheit!Essa foi por pouco! Ainda bem que tínhamos um pouco de energia sobrando para o <color=#ffaa00>teletransporte</color>. Estamos a salvo agora!好險！幸好我們有預留能量進行<color=#ffaa00>傳送</color>。我們現在安全了!Hampir saja! Untungnya kita masih punya energi untuk <color=#ffaa00>teleportasi</color>. Kita aman sekarang!เกือบไปแล้ว! เราโชคดีจริงๆที่มีพลังงานเก็บไว้อยู่บ้างเพื่อ<color=#ffaa00>เทเลพอร์ต</color> ตอนนี้เราปลอดภัยแล้ว!¡Eso estuvo cerca! Tenemos suerte de que hayamos guardado algo de energía para <color=#ffaa00>teletransportarnos</color>... ¡Ahora estamos a salvo!Мы чуть не погибли! К счастью, у нас была энергия для <color=#ffaa00>телепортации</color>. Теперь мы в безопасности!Ucuz atlattık! <color=#ffaa00>Işınlanma</color> için biraz enerjimiz kaldığı için şanslıyız. Artık güvendeyiz!Suýt nữa thì toi! May là ta còn chút năng lượng dự trữ để <color=#ffaa00>dịch chuyển</color>. Giờ ta đã an toàn rồi!That was close! Luckily we had energy saved up for <color=#ffaa00>teleportation</color>. We are safe now!That was close! Luckily we had energy saved up for <color=#ffaa00>teleportation</color>. We are safe now!That was close! Luckily we had energy saved up for <color=#ffaa00>teleportation</color>. We are safe now!That was close! Luckily we had energy saved up for <color=#ffaa00>teleportation</color>. We are safe now!That was close! Luckily we had energy saved up for <color=#ffaa00>teleportation</color>. We are safe now!还好基地能量足够支持<color=#ffaa00>迁城</color>，这下安全了！
231
1011100236v11_32_2我给大人整理了一些任务目标，只要跟随<color=#ffaa00>任务</color>指引，壮大实力，我们一定能夺回火箭！Make sure to follow the <color=#ffaa00>tasks</color> and to develop your City to increase your power. We will take the Rocket back soon enough!Continuez à développer votre ville et accomplir des <color=#ffaa00>missions</color> pour devenir encore plus puissant. Ainsi, vous pourrez bientôt récupérer la fusée!Stelle sicher, dass du den <color=#ffaa00>Aufgaben</color> folgst und deine Stadt weiterentwickelst, um stärker zu werden. Wir werden die Rakete bald zurückbringen!Siga as <color=#ffaa00>tarefas</color> e desenvolva sua cidade para aumentar seu poder. Logo vamos recuperar o foguete!跟著<color=#ffaa00>任務</color>指示發展城鎮，增強實力！我們很快就能奪回火箭！Pastikan untuk mengikuti <color=#ffaa00>tugas</color> dan mengembangkan Kotamu untuk meningkatkan kekuatan. Kita akan secepatnya mengambil Roketnya lagi!ตรวจสอบให้แน่ใจว่าคุณได้ทำ<color=#ffaa00>งาน</color>และพัฒนาเมืองของคุณเพื่อเพิ่มพลังขึ้นแล้ว เราจะนำจรวดของคุณกลับมาให้เร็วๆนี้!Asegúrate de seguir las <color=#ffaa00>tareas</color> para desarrollar tu Ciudad e incrementar tu poder. ¡Traeremos el Cohete de regreso pronto!Не забудьте, что нужно выполнять <color=#ffaa00>задания</color> и развивать свой город, чтобы наращивать силы. Мы и оглянуться не успеем, как вернем ракету!<color=#ffaa00>Görevleri</color> yap ve gücünü artırmak için Şehrini geliştir. Yakında Roketi geri alacağız!Hãy nhớ làm theo các <color=#ffaa00>nhiệm vụ</color> và phát triển Thành Phố để tăng chiến lực của bạn. Chúng tôi sẽ đưa Hỏa Tiễn trở lại sớm thôi!Make sure to follow the <color=#ffaa00>tasks</color> and to develop your City to increase your power. We will take the Rocket back soon enough!Make sure to follow the <color=#ffaa00>tasks</color> and to develop your City to increase your power. We will take the Rocket back soon enough!Make sure to follow the <color=#ffaa00>tasks</color> and to develop your City to increase your power. We will take the Rocket back soon enough!Make sure to follow the <color=#ffaa00>tasks</color> and to develop your City to increase your power. We will take the Rocket back soon enough!Make sure to follow the <color=#ffaa00>tasks</color> and to develop your City to increase your power. We will take the Rocket back soon enough!我给大人整理了一些任务目标，只要跟随<color=#ffaa00>任务</color>指引，壮大实力，我们一定能夺回火箭！

1011100237v11_1_1_6啊！又有一名强壮的狩猎者加入<color=#606b86>{0}</color>，我们这儿唯一的规矩就是，都得听我的！Welcome to the <color=#606b86>{0}</color>! Glad to have a new strong hunter like you on board. Just remember one thing, I give the orders here!Bienvenue chez les <color=#606b86>{0}</color>! Ca fait plaisir d'accueillir un chasseur comme vous. Par contre, gardez ça bien en tête: c'est moi qui donne les ordres ici!Willkommen bei der <color=#606b86>{0}</color>! Schön, dass wir einen neuen starken Jäger bei uns haben! Aber vergiss nicht: Ich hab hier das Kommando!Bem-vindo a <color=#606b86>{0}</color>! Que bom contar com poderosos caçadores como você. Só precisa lembrar de uma coisa: eu é que mando aqui!歡迎加入<color=#606b86>{0}</color>！有你這樣的新血加入狩獵實在太好了。只要記住一點：一切聽我指揮！Selamat datang di <color=#606b86>{0}</color>! Kami bangga menyambut pemburu tangguh baru sepertimu. Tapi ingat satu hal, saya yang memimpin di sini!ยินดีต้อนรับสู่ <color=#606b86>{0}</color>! ดีใจที่ได้ฮันเตอร์ที่เก่งกาจอย่างคุณมาร่วมทางด้วย จำไว้อย่างหนึ่งนะ ฉันเป็นคนเดียวที่ออกคำสั่งได้!¡Te damos la bienvenida al clan <color=#606b86>{0}</color>! Estamos contentos de tener un cazador poderoso como tú a bordo. Solamente recuerda una cosa, ¡yo doy las ordenes aquí!<color=#606b86>{0}</color> приветствуют тебя! Нам пригодится новый сильный охотник. Только уясни хорошенько, что командую здесь я.<color=#606b86>{0}</color> bünyesine hoş geldin! Senin gibi güçlü bir avcıyı aramızda görmek güzel. Tek bir şeyi unutma, burada emirleri ben veririm!Chào mừng bạn đến với <color=#606b86>{0}</color>! Rất vui khi có một thợ săn mạnh mẽ mới như bạn ở trong đoàn. Chỉ cần nhớ một điều thôi, ở đây tôi là người ra lệnh!Welcome to the <color=#606b86>{0}</color>! Glad to have a new strong hunter like you on board. Just remember one thing, I give the orders here!Welcome to the <color=#606b86>{0}</color>! Glad to have a new strong hunter like you on board. 1011100238v11_1_2_6最强的氏族英雄【修改】和勇武精神为我们夺得了火箭发射的机会！Power and courage help us launch Rockets.Il faut du courage et de la force pour faire décoller des fusées.Stärke und Mut helfen uns dabei, die Rakete zu starten.Poder e coragem nos ajudam a lançar foguetes.力量和勇氣可以幫我們把火箭帶上太空。Kekuatan dan keberanian akan membantu kita meluncurkan Roket.สิ่งที่จะช่วยพวกเราส่งจรวดออกไปได้ ก็คือพลังและความกล้าEl poder y el coraje nos ayudan a lanzar cohetes.Сила и храбрость помогают нам запускать ракеты.Güç ve yüreklilik Roketleri fırlatmamıza yardımcı oluyor.Sức mạnh và lòng can đảm sẽ giúp chúng tôi phóng Hỏa Tiễn thành công.Power and courage help us launch Rockets.Power and courage help us launch Rockets.Power and courage help us launch Rockets.Power and courage help us launch Rockets.Power and courage help us launch Rockets.最强的氏族英雄【修改】和勇武精神为我们夺得了火箭发射的机会！

1011100239v11_1_3_6让我们来看看这枚火箭……额……它应该快发射了吧？What you're about to see now is a true milestone for us. The launch of our Rocket.Ce que vous vous apprêtez à voir maintenant est un évènement majeur pour nous: le décollage de notre fusée!Was du gleich sehen wirst, ist ein absoluter Meilenstein für uns: Der Start unserer Rakete.O que você está prestes a ver é um grande marco para nós. O lançamento do nosso foguete.你即將看到的，是我們的里程埤。火箭發射的瞬間。Yang kamu lihat sekarang adalah pencapaian yang sebenarnya bagi kita. Peluncuran Roket.สิ่งที่คุณกำลังจะเห็นต่อจากนี้คือเหตุการณ์สำคัญของพวกเรา การออกปฏิบัติการของยานเราLo que estás a punto de ver ahora es un verdadero logro para nosotros. El lanzamiento de nuestro cohete.Сейчас ты станешь свидетелем поистине исторического для нас момента. Запуска нашей ракеты.Şimdi göreceğin şey bizim için gerçek bir dönüm noktası. Roketimizin fırlatılışı.Những gì bạn sắp thấy lúc này là một điểm mốc thực sự đối với chúng tôi. Buổi phóng Hỏa Tiễn của chúng tôi.What you're about to see now is a true milestone for us. The launch of our Rocket.What you're about to see now is a true milestone for us. The launch of our Rocket.What you're about to see now is a true milestone for us. The launch of our Rocket.What you're about to see now is a true milestone for us. The launch of our Rocket.What you're about to see now is a true milestone for us. 1011100240v11_3_1_6这有什么难的？都给我找<color=#ffaa00>货运枢纽【修改】</color>去！平时耀武扬威，现在考验来了！What now? Do we need more <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>? Then, this is the time to show me your skills, monkey!Quoi? Nous avons besoin d'encore plus <color=#ffaa00>d'uranium</color>? C'est le moment de faire vos preuves, gorillon!Und jetzt? Brauchen wir mehr <color=#ffaa00>Uran</color>? Dann ist das der Moment, in dem du zeigen kannst, was in dir steckt, Affe!E agora? Precisamos de mais <color=#ffaa00>urânio</color>? Então chegou a hora de mostrar do que é capaz, macaco!怎麼了？是不是要尋找更多的<color=#ffaa00>鈾料</color>？是時候給我露兩手了，猴子！Sekarang bagaimana? Apa kita perlu lebih banyak <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>? Este el momento de mostrarme tus habilidades, mono.Ну что еще? Нужно больше <color=#ffaa00>урана</color>? Значит, пришло твое время, примат. Покажи, что ты можешь!Peki ya şimdi? Daha fazla <color=#ffaa00>Uranyuma</color> ihtiyacımız var mı? O zaman şimdi bana becerilerini göstermelisin maymun!Giờ thì sao ấy à? Chúng ta có cần thêm <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color> không hả? Chà, đến lúc cho tôi thấy kỹ năng của bạn rồi đấy, chúa khỉ!What now? Do we need more <color=#ffaa00>Uranium</color>? Then, this is the time to show me your skills, monkey!What now? 1011100242v11_6_1_6到底是谁捅出的篓子？我要踢烂他们的屁股！<color=#ffaa00>基地</color>的这群蠢货先交给你了，找回火箭，别让我失望！Our Rocket! This <color=#ffaa00>City</color> is under your command now. I need to organize a search party and punish the monkey responsible for this! Help us find the Rocket. Don't let me down!Non, la fusée! <color=#ffaa00>la ville</color> est à vous, maintenant. Je dois réunir une équipe de recherche et punir le coupable! Aidez-moi à trouver la fusée. Ne me décevez pas!Unsere Rakete! Diese <color=#ffaa00>Stadt</color> steht jetzt unter deinem Befehl! Ich werde einen Suchtrupp organisieren und den Affen finden, der dafür verantwortlich ist. Hilf uns dabei, die Rakete zu finden. Und enttäusche mich nicht!Nosso foguete! A <color=#ffaa00>cidade</color> está sob o seu comando agora. Preciso organizar uma equipe de busca e punir o macaco responsável! Nos ajude a encontrar o foguete. Não me decepcione!我們的火箭！這個<color=#ffaa00>城鎮</color>就交給你指揮了。我要組織一支搜索隊伍，教訓犯事的猴子！幫我們把火箭找回來。別令我失望！Roket kita! <color=#ffaa00>Kota</color> ini di bawah pimpinanmu sekarang. Saya harus menyiapkan pesta pencarian dan menghukum kera yang bertanggung jawab atas semua ini! Bantu kami menemukan Roket. Jangan kecewakan saya!จรวดของพวกเรา! <color=#ffaa00>เมือง</color>แห่งนี้อยู่ภ ายใต้คำสั่งของคุณแล้ว ฉันต้อง รวบรวมทีมค้นหาและสั่งสอนเจ้ าจ๋อที่ต้ องรับผิดชอบกับเรื่องพ วกนี้! ช่วยพวกเ ราค้นหายานทีสิ อย่าทำให้ฉันผิดหวังล่ะ!¡Nuestro cohete! Esta <color=#ffaa00>Ciudad</color> está bajo tu comando ahora. Necesito organizar una partida de búsqueda y castigar al mono responsable de esto. ¡Ayúdanos a encontrar el cohete y no me decepciones!Что?! Наша ракета! Что ж, теперь за <color=#ffaa00>город</color> отвечаешь ты. А я займусь организацией поисковой группы и задам трепку той обезьяне, которая в этом виновата! Помоги нам отыскать ракету. Не подведи меня!Roketimiz! Bu <color=#ffaa00>Şehir</color> artık senin komutan altında. Bir arama ekibi oluşturmam ve bunun sorumlusu olan maymunu cezalandırmam gerekiyor! Roketi bulmama yardım et. Beni hayal kırıklığına uğratma!Hỏa Tiễn của chúng ta! <color=#ffaa00>Thành Phố</color> này giờ đã nằm dưới sự chỉ huy của bạn. Tôi cần tổ chức một đội tìm kiếm và trừng phạt vị chúa khỉ đảm nhận trách nhiệm cho việc này! Hãy giúp chúng tôi tìm Hỏa Tiễn. Đừng khiến tôi thất vọng nhé!Our Rocket! This <color=#ffaa00>City</color> is under your command now. I need to organize a search party and punish the monkey responsible for this! Help us find the Rocket. Don't let me down!Our Rocket! This <color=#ffaa00>City</color> is under your command now. I need to organize a search party and punish the monkey responsible for this! Help us find the Rocket. Don't let me down!Our Rocket!
